blocks.geez: ሚመጠን ግርምት ዛቲ ዕለት ወዕፅበት ዛቲ ሰዓት እንተ ባቲ ይወርድ መንፈስ ቅዱስ አመልዕልት ሰማያት ወይጼልሎ ለዝንቱ መሥዋዕት ወይቄድሶ ፣ በጽሙና ወበፍርሃት ቁሙ ወጸልዩ ከመ ሰላሙ ለእግዚኣብሔር የሃሉ ምስሌየ ወምስለ ኩልክሙ
blocks.amharic: ይህች ቀን ምን ያህል የምታስፈራ ናት? ይህችስ ሰዓት ምን ያህል የምታስጨንቅ ናት? መንፈስ ቅዱስ ከሰማየ ሰማያት የሚወርድባት፣ ይህን መሥዋዕቱን የሚሰውርባትና የሚያከብርባት ፣ በጽሙናና በመፍራት ቁሙ፣ የእግዚኣብሔር ሰላም ከእኛና ከእናንት ጋራ ይሁን ዘንድ ጸለዩ፣
blocks.english: How awful is this day and how marvelous this hour wherein the Holy Spirit will descend from heaven and over-shadow and hallow this sacrifice. In quietness and in fear stand up and pray that the peace of God be with me and with all of you
blocks.transliteration: Mimeten giremt zati ilet we'itsbet zati se'at inte bati yiwerd menfes qidus ameli'ilte semayat weyitselilo lezintu mesqa'it weyiqediso betsimuna webefirhat qumu wetseliyu keme selamu le'igzee'abher yehalu msleye wemisle kulikimu
blocks.speaker: priest

title.english: You are the Pot of pure gold

blocks.geez: አንቲ ውእቱ መሶበ ወርቅ ንጹሕ እንተ ውስቴታ መና ኅቡዕ ኅብስት ዘወረደ እምሰማያት ወሀቤ ሕይወት ለኵሉ ዓለም።
blocks.amharic: ለዓለም ሁሉ ሕይወት የሚሰጥ ከሰማይ የወረደ ኅብስት የተሠወረ መና ያለብሽ፣ ንጹሕ የወርቅ መሶብ አንቺ ነሽ።
blocks.english: Thou art the pot of pure gold wherein is hidden the manna, the bread which came down from heaven giving life unto all the world.
blocks.transliteration: Antee wi'itu mesobewerq nitsuh inte wistéta mena hibu'i hibist zewerede imsemayat wehabé hiywet lekwulu alem.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ቡሩክ እግዚአብሔር አብ አኃዜ ኵሉ ዓለም አምላክነ።
blocks.amharic: ዓለምን የያዘ እግዚአብሔር አብ ቡሩክ ነው።
blocks.english: Blessed be the Lord, Almighty Father, our God.
blocks.transliteration: Buruk Igzee'abihér Ab ahazé kwulu alem amlakine.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: አሜን።
blocks.english: Amen.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ወቡሩክ ወልድ ዋሕድ እግዚእነ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ መድኃኒነ።
blocks.amharic: ጌታችን መድኃኒታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ወልድ ዋሕድም ቡሩክ ነው።
blocks.english: And blessed be the only Son, our Lord and our Savior Jesus Christ.
blocks.transliteration: Weburuk weld wahid igzee'ine Eeyesus Kiristos medhaneene.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: አሜን።
blocks.english: Amen.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ወቡሩክ መንፈስ ቅዱስ ጰራቅሊጦስ መጽንዒ ወመንጽሔ ኵልነ።
blocks.amharic: ሁላችንን የሚያነጻ፣ የሚያጸና መንፈስ ቅዱስም ቡሩክ ነው።
blocks.english: And blessed be the Holy Spirit, the Paraclete, the comforter and cleanser of us all.
blocks.transliteration: Weburuk Menfes Qidus peraqleetos mentsi'ee wementsihé kwuline.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: አሜን።
blocks.english: Amen.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ስብሐት ወክብር ይደሉ ለሥሉስ ቅዱስ አብ ወወልድ ወመንፈስ ቅዱስ ዕሩይ ኵሉ ጊዜ ይእዜኒ ወዘልፈኒ ወለዓለመ ዓለም አሜን።
blocks.amharic: ልዩ ሦስት ለሚሆኑ ሁልጊዜም ለተካከሉ ለአብ ለወልድ ለመንፈስ ቅዱስ ክብር ምስጋና ይገባል። ዛሬም ዘወትርም ለዘላለሙ አሜን
blocks.english: Glory and honor are due to the Holy Trinity, the Father and the Son and the Holy Spirit, always coequal, both now and ever and world without end. Amen.
blocks.transliteration: Sibhat wekibir yidelu lesilus qidus Ab weWeld weMenfes Qidus iruy kwulo geezé yi'izénee wezelfenee wele'aleme alem amén.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ጸልዩ አበውየ ወአኀውየ ላዕሌየ ወላዕለ ዝንቱ መሥዋዕት።
blocks.amharic: አባቶቼና ወንድሞቼ በእኔ ላይ በመሥዋዕቱም ላይ ጸልዩ።
blocks.english: My fathers and my brothers, pray for me and for this sacrifice.
blocks.transliteration: Íeliyu abewiye we'ahawiye la'iléye wela'ilezintu meswa'it.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: እግዚአብሔር ይስማዕከ ኵሎ ዘሰአልከ ወይትወከፍ መስዋዕተከ ወቍርባነከ ከመ መሥዋዕተ መልከ ጼዴቅ ወአሮን ወዘካርያስ ካህናተ ቤተክርስቲያኑ ለበኵር።
blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር የለመንከውን ሁሉ ይስማህ። የበኵር የቤተክርስቲያኑ ካህናቱ የሚሆኑ የመልከ ጼዴቅንና የአሮንን የዘካርያስንም መሥዋዕት እንደተቀበለ መሥዋዕትህን ቍርባንህንም ይቀበልልህ።
blocks.english:
May God hear thee in all that thou hast asked and accept thy sacrifice and offering like the sacrifice of Melchisedek and Aaron and
Zacharias, the priests of the church of the First-born;
blocks.transliteration: Igzee'abihér yisma'ike kwulo zese'alike weyitwekef meswa'iteke weqwurbaneke keme meswa'ite Melke Íédék we'Aaron weZekariyas kahinate béte kiristeeyanu lebekwur.
blocks.speaker: asst. priest

blocks.geez: አቡነ ዘበሰማያት ይትቀደስ ስምከ ትምጻእ መንግሥትከ ወይኩን ፈቃድከ በከመ በሰማይ ከማሁ በምድር። ሲሳየነ ዘለለ ዕለትነ ሀበነ ዮም።  ኅድግ ለነ አበሳነ ወጌጋየነ ከመ ንሕነኒ ንኅድግ ለዘአበሰ ለነ።
blocks.amharic: አባታችን ሆይ! በሰማይ የምትኖር፣ ስምህ ይቀደስ፣ መንገሥትህ ትምጣ፣ ፈቃድህ በሰማይ እንደ ሆነ እንዲሁም በምድር ይሁን! የዕለት እንጀራችንን ስጠን ዛሬ፣በደላችንን ይቅር በለን፣ እኛም የበደሉንን ይቅር እንደምንል፣
blocks.english: Our father who art in heaven, hallowed be thy name, Thy kingdom come  Thy will be done on earth as it is in heaven; give us this day our daily bread, and forgive us our trespasses as we forgive them that trespass against us,
blocks.transliteration: Abune zebesemayat yitqedes simike timtsa'i mengistike weyikun feqadike bekeme besemay kemahu medir. Seesayene zelele'iletine habene yom.  Hidig lene abesane wegégayene keme nihinenee nihidig leze'abese lene.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ኢታብአነ እግዚኦ ውስተ መንሱት አላ አድኅነነ ወባልሐነ እምኵሉ እኩይ እስመ ዚኣከ ይእቲ መንግሥት ኃይል ወስብሐት ለዓለመ ዓለም።
blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ወደ ፈተና አታግባን፣ ከክፉ ሁሉ አድነን እንጂ፣  መንግሥት ያንተ ናትና። ኃይል፣ ምስጋና ለዘለዓለም በእውነት።
blocks.english: and lead us not into temptation but deliver us and rescue us from all evil; for Thine is the kingdom, the power and the glory for ever and ever.
blocks.transliteration: eetabi'ane egzi’o weste mensut ala adihinene webalihane imkwulu iku’y isme zee'ake yi'itee mengist hayl wesibihat le'alem alem.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: በሰላመ ቅዱስ ገብርኤል መልአክ ኦ እግዝእትየ ማርያም ሰላም ለኪ እመ እግዚአብሔር ጸባዖት ሰላም ለኪ ቡርክት አንቲ እምአንስት ወቡሩክ ፍሬ ከርሥኪ። ተፈሥሒ ፍሥሕት ኦ ምልእተ ጸጋ እግዚአብሔር ምስሌኪ። ሰአሊ ወጸልዪ ኀበ ፍቁር ወልድኪ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ከመ ይሥረይ ለነ ኃጣውኢነ።
blocks.amharic: እመቤታችን ቅድስት ድንግል ማርያም ሆይ በመልአኩ በቅዱስ ገብረኤል ሰላምታ ሰላም እልሻለሁ ድንግል በኅሊናኪ ወድንግል በሥጋኪ።  በሃሳብሽ ድንግል ነሽ በሥጋሽም ድንግል ነሽ። የአሸናፊ የእግዚአብሔር እናት ሆይ ሰላምታ ላንቺ ይገባል። ከሴቶች ሁሉ ተለይተሽ አንቺ የትባረክሽ ነሽ የማኅፀንሽም ፍሬ የተባረከ ነው። ጸጋን የተመላሽ ሆይ ደስ ይበልሽ እግዚአብሔር ከአንቺ ጋር ነውና ከተወደደው ልጅሽ ከጌታችን ከመድኃኒታችን ከኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ዘንድ ይቅርታን ለምኝልን ኃጢአታችንን ያስተሠርይልን ዘንድ ለዘለዓለሙ አሜን።
blocks.english: O Holy Virgin Mary, in the peace of the Angel Gabriel, peace be unto Thee. Thou art virgin in spirit as well as in body. O Thou Mother of Perfect God peace be unto Thee. Blessed art Thou among women and blessed is the Fruit of Thy womb. Rejoice O Thou who art full of grace the Lord is with Thee.
blocks.transliteration: Beselame qidus gebriel mel’ak o egzi’etiye Mariyam selam leki dingil behilinaki wedingil besigaki eme egziabiheir tseba’ot selam leki burikt anti em’a’nist weburuk fire kersike tefesihi fisiht o meli’i’te tsega egziabihear misle’ki seali wetseliye habe fiqur weldike eyesus kristos keme y’sre’y lene hatawi’ine
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ሰአሊ ወጸልዪ ኀበ ፍቁር ወልድኪ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ከመ ይሥረይ ለነ ኃጣውኢነ።
blocks.amharic: ከተወደደው ልጅሽ ከጌታችን ከመድኃኒታችን ከኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ዘንድ ይቅርታን ለምኝልን ኃጢአታችንን ያስተሠርይልን ዘንድ ለዘለዓለሙ አሜን።
blocks.english: Ask and pray for us to Thy beloved Son, Jesus Christ that He may have mercy upon our souls and forgive us our sins. Amen.
blocks.transliteration: seali wetseliye habe fiqur weldike eyesus kristos keme y’sre’y lene hatawi’ine
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: አሐዱ አብ ቅዱስ፤ አሐዱ ወልድ ቅዱስ፤ አሐዱ ውእቱ መንፈስ ቅዱስ።
blocks.amharic: አንዱ ቅዱስ አብ ነው፤ አንዱ ቅዱስ ወልድ ነው፤ አንዱ ቅዱስ መንፈስ ቅዱስ ነው።
blocks.english: One is the Holy Father, one is the Holy Son, one is the Holy Spirit.
blocks.transliteration: Ahadu Ab Qidus, Ahadu Weld Qidus, Ahadu wi'itu Menfes Qidus.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: በአማን አብ ቅዱስ፤ በአማን ወልድ ቅዱስ፤ በአማን ውእቱ መንፈስ ቅዱስ።
blocks.amharic: አብ በእውነት ቅዱስ ነው፤ ወልድ በእውነት ቅዱስ ነው፡ መንፈስ ቅዱስም በእውነት ቅዱስ ነው።
blocks.english: Truly the Father is Holy, truly the Son is Holy, truly the Holy Spirit is Holy.
blocks.transliteration: Be'aman Ab qidus, be'Aman Wold qidus, be'aman wi'itu Menfes Qidus.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ሕዝቦችም ሁላችሁ እግዚአብሔርን አመስግኑት።
blocks.english: Praise the Lord, all you nations.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ሕዝቡ ሁሉ ያመሰግኑታል።
blocks.english: And praise him, all you people.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ምሕረቱ በእኛ ላይ ጸንታለችና።
blocks.english: For his merciful kindness is great toward us.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: የእግዚአብሔር ቸርነቱ ለዘለዓለም ይኖራል።
blocks.english: And the Truth of the Lord endures for ever.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ለአብ፣ ለወልድ፣ ለመንፈስ ቅዱስ ምስጋና ይገባል።
blocks.english: Glory be to the Father and to the Son and to the Holy Spirit
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ለአብ፣ ለወልድ፣ ለመንፈስ ቅዱስ ምስጋና ይገባል። (ካህኑ ያለውን መልሰው ይበሉ።)
blocks.english: Glory be to the Father and to the Son and to the Holy Spirit
blocks.transliteration: Sibhat le'Ab, weWold, weMenfes Qidus. (Shall repeat priests words)
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ይእዜኒ ወዘልፈኒ ወለዓለመ ዓለም አሜን ሃሌ ሉያ።
blocks.amharic: ዛሬም ዘወትርም ለዘለዓለሙ አሜን ሃሌ ሉያ። ካህኑ ያለውን መልሰው ይበሉ
blocks.english: Both now and ever and world without end. Amen.
blocks.transliteration: Yi'izénee wezelfenee wele'alem alem amen halléluya.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ይእዜኒ ወዘልፈኒ ወለዓለመ ዓለም አሜን ሃሌ ሉያ።
blocks.amharic: ዛሬም ዘወትርም ለዘለዓለሙ አሜን ሃሌ ሉያ። ካህኑ ያለውን መልሰው ይበሉ
blocks.english: Both now and ever and world without end. Amen.
blocks.transliteration: Yi'izénee wezelfenee wele'alem alem amen halléluya.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ለጸሎት ተነሡ።
blocks.english: Stand up for prayer.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Lord have mercy upon us.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ሰላም ለሁላችሁም።
blocks.english: Peace be unto you all.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: And with Your Spirit.
blocks.speaker: congregation
priest
blocks.amharic: ለኛ በጎ ነገርን ያደረገ ይቅር ባይ እግዚአብሔርን እናመሰግነዋለን። ይቅር ባይ የጌታችን የአምላካችንና የመድኃኒታችን የኢየሱስ ከርስቶስ አባት ሰውሮናልና ረድቶናልና ጠብቆ አቅርቦናልና ወደ እርሱም
blocks.english: We give thanks unto the doer of good things unto us, the merciful God, the Father of our Lord and our God and our Savior Jesus Christ: for He hath covered us and succored us, He hath kept us and brought us nigh and received us unto Himself, and undertaken our defense, and strengthened us, and brought us unto this hour. Let us therefore

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.amharic: ተቀብሎናልና አጽንቶ ጠብቆናልና። እስከዚች ሰዓት አድርሶናልና። አሁንም ክብርት በምትሆን በዚች ዕለት በሕይወታችን ዘመን ሁሉ በፍጹም ሰላም ሁሉን የሚይዝ አምላካችን እግዚአብሔር ይጠብቀን ዘንድ እንለምነው።
blocks.english: pray unto Him that the Almighty Lord our God keep us in this holy day and all the days of our life in all peace.

blocks.amharic: ጸልዩ
blocks.english: All you pray
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.geez: ሁሉን የያዝህ ጌታችን እግዚአብሔር የጌታችንና የአምላካችን የመድኃኒታችን የኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ አባት በሥራው ሁሉ ላይ ስለ ሥራው ሁሉ በሥራውም ሁሉ ውስጥ እናመሰግንሃለን፣ ሰውረኸናልና፣ ረድተኸናልና፣ ጠብቀኸናልና፣ ወዳንተ አቅርበኸናልና፣ ጥግ ሆነኸናልና፣ አጽንተኸናልና፣ እስከዚችም ሰዓት አድርሰኸናልና።
blocks.english: Master, Lord God Almighty, the Father of our Lord and our God and our Savior Jesus Christ, we render Thee thanks upon everything, for everything and in everything, for Thou hast covered us and succored us, hast kept us and brought us nigh, and received us unto Thyself, and undertaken our defense, and strengthened us and brought us unto this hour.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ኅሡ ወአስተብቍዑ ከመ ይምሐረነ እግዚአብሔር ወይሣሃል ላዕሌነ፡ ወይትወከፍ ጸሎተ ወስእለተ እምነ ቅዱሳኒሁ በእንቲአነ በዘይሤኒ ኵሎ ጊዜ ይረስየነ ድልዋነ ከመ ንንሣእ እምሱታፌ ምስጢር ቡሩክ ወይሥረይ ለነ ኃጣውኢነ።
blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር ይምረን ዘንድ ይቅርም ይለን ዘንድ ደጅ ጥኑ ተማለዱ። ስለእኛ ከቅዱሳን ጸሎትን ልመናንም ይቀበል ዘንድ ሁልጊዜ ባማረ ነገር ቡሩክ ከሚሆን ምስጢር አንድነት እንድንቀበል የበቃን ያደርገን ዘንድ።
blocks.english: Entreat and beseech that the Lord have pity upon us and be merciful to us and receive prayer and supplication from his saints on our behalf according to what is expedient at all times, so that he may make us meet to partake of the communion of the blessed sacrament and forgive us our sins.
blocks.transliteration: Hisu we'astebiqwu'u keme yimharene Igzee'abihér weyisahal la'iléne. Weyitwekef Tselote wesi'ilete imine qidusaneehu be'intee'ane bezeyisénee kwulu geezé yiresiyene dilwane Keme ninisa'i imsutafé misteer buruk weyisirey hataweene.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: ኪርያላይሶን።
blocks.english: Lord have mercy
blocks.speaker: congregation
priest
blocks.amharic:
ስለዚህ እንለምንኃለን ከቸርነትህም እንሻለን፤ ሰውን የምትወድ ሆይ ከብር የምትሆን ይህችን ዕለት እንድንፈጽም ስጠን፤ የሕይወታችንን ዘመን ሁሉ በፍጹም ሰላም አንተን ከመፍራት ጋራ።
ቅንዓትን ሁሉ መከራውንም ሁሉ የሰይጣንንም ሥራ ሁሉ፤ የክፎች ሰዎችንም ምክር
blocks.english: For this cause we pray and entreat of Thy goodness, O lover of man, grant us to complete this holy day and all the days of our life in all peace along with thy fear. All envy, all trial, all the working of Satan, the counsel of evil, and all the uprisings of adversaries, secret and open. Remove far from me and from all Thy people and

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.amharic: የጠላትንም መነሳት የተሰወረውንና የተገለጸውን። አቤቱ ከእነ አርቅ። ከሕዝቢህም ሁሉ ያንተ ከሚሆን ከዚህም ቅዱስ ቦታ  በጎውን ነገር ሁሉ ያማረውንና የሚሻለውን እዘዝልን፤ እባቡን ጊንጡንም የጠላትንም ኃይል ሁሉ አንረግጥ ዘንድ ሥልጣንን የሰጠኸን አንተ ነህና። ወደ መከራ አታግባን
blocks.english: from this Thy holy place (benediction over those things which are on the altar). All good things, that are expedient and excellent, command Thou for us, for Thou art He that hath given us power to tread upon serpents and scorpions and upon all the power of the enemy. Lead us not into temptation, but deliver us and rescue us from all evil:

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.amharic: ከክፉ ነገር ሁሉ አድነን እንጂ።። አንድ ልጅህ ጌታችንና አምላካችን መድኃኒታችንም ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ለሰው ፍቅር ብሎ ባደረገው ቸርነትና ይቅርታ። በርሱ ያለ ምስጋና ክብር ጽንዕ ከእርሱ ጋራ ላንተ ይገባል፣ ካንተ ጋራ ትክክልና ማሕየዊ ከሚሆን ከምንፈስ ቅዱስም ጋራ ዛሬም፤ ዘወትርም ለዘላለሙ አሜን።
blocks.english: in the grace and loving kindness which were shown by the love towards man-kind of Thy only-begotten Son, our lord and our God and our Savior Jesus Christ, through whom to Thee with Him and with the Holy Spirit, the life-giver, who is coequal with Thee are fitting glory and honor and dominion, both now and ever and world without end. Amen.

blocks.amharic: ለጸሎት ተነሡ።
blocks.english: Stand up for prayer.
blocks.speaker: asst. deacon

blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Lord have mercy upon us.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ሰላም ለሁላችሁም።
blocks.english: Peace be unto you all.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: And with Your Spirit.
blocks.speaker: congregation
asst. priest
blocks.amharic: ዳግመኛም ሁሉን የሚይዝ የጌታችንና የመድኃኒታችን የኢየሱስ ክርስቶስን አባት እግዚአብሔርን እንማልዳለን። ከሁሉ በላይ በምትሆን በከበረች በአንዲት ቤተ ክርስቲያን መባ ሰለሚያገቡ፣ መሥዋዕቱን፣ ቀዳምያቱንም ካሥር አንዱን፣
blocks.english: And again let us beseech the almighty Lord, the Father of the Lord our Savior Jesus Christ, on behalf of those who bring an oblation within the one holy universal church, a sacrifice, first fruits, tithes, a thank offering, a memorial, whether much or little, in secret or openly, and of those who wish to give and have not wherewith to

blocks.speaker: asst. priest
blocks.amharic: የመታሰቢያ ምስጋናን፣ ብዙውንና ጥቂቱን፣ የተሰወረውንና የተገለጸውን፣ ይሰጡ ዘንድ ሲወዱ የሚሰጡት ከሌላቸው ላይ ፈቃዳቸውን ተቀብሎ መንግሥተ ሰማያትን ይሰጥ ዘንድ ለሁሉ በረከትን የሚያድልበት ሥልጣን ገንዘቡ የሚሆን አምላካችን እግዚአብሔር።
blocks.english: give, that He accept their ready mind, that He vouchsafe to them the heavenly kingdom; power over all works of blessing belongs to the Lord our God.

blocks.amharic: መባ ስለሚያቀርቡ ሰዎች ጸልዩ።
blocks.english: Pray for them who bring an oblation.
blocks.speaker: asst. deacon

blocks.geez: ተወከፍ መባኦሙ ለአኃው ወተወከፍ መባኦን ለአኃት ለነኒ ተወከፍ መባአነ ወቍርባነነ።
blocks.amharic: የወንዶችን መባቸውን ተቀበል። የሴቶችንም መባቸውን ተቀበል። የኛንም መባችንን ቁርባናችንንም ተቀበል።
blocks.english: Accept the oblation of our brethren, accept the oblation of our sisters, and ours also accept, our oblation and our offering.
blocks.transliteration: Tewekef meba'omu le'ahaw wetewekef meba'on le'ahat lenenee tewekef meba'ane weqwurbanene.
blocks.speaker: congregation
asst. priest
blocks.geez: ሁሉን የምትገዛ አምላካችን እግዚአብሔር ሆይ! እንለምንሃለን እንማልድሃለንም ከሁሉ በላይ በምትሆን ባንዲት ቅድስት ቤተ ክርስቲያን ውስጥ መባ ስለሚያገቡ ሰዎች። መሥዋዕቱ፣ መጀመሪያውን፣ ካሥር አንዱን፣ የመታሰቢያ ምስጋናውን፣ ብዙውንና ጥቂቱን
blocks.english: Lord our God who art almighty, we pray Thee and beseech Thee for them that bring an oblation within the one holy universal church, a sacrifice, first-fruits, tithes, a thank offering, a memorial, whether much or little, in secret or openly, and for those who wish to give and have not wherewith to give. Thy acceptance of their ready mind

blocks.speaker: asst. priest
blocks.geez: የተሰወረውንና የተገለጸውን ይሰጡም ዘንድ ሊወዱ የሚሰጡት ከሌላቸው ላይ ፈቃዳቸውን ተቀብለህ ለሁሉም የበረከት ዋጋን ስጥ፤ ዕድል ፈንታ ትሆን ዘንድ። በአንድ ልጅህ በርሱ ያለ ክብር ጽንዕ ላንተ ይገባል ከርሱ ጋራ ከመንፈስ ቅዱስም ጋራ ዛሬም ዘወትርም ለዘላለሙ በእውነት።
blocks.english: grant Thou unto every one: let the recompense of blessing be a portion to all of them: through Thy only begotten Son, through whom to Thee with Him and with the Holy Spirit be glory and dominion, both now and ever and world without end. Amen.

blocks.amharic: ለጸሎት ተነሡ።
blocks.english: Stand up for prayer.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Lord have mercy upon us.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ሰላም ለሁላችሁም።
blocks.english: Peace be unto you all.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: And with Your Spirit.
blocks.speaker: congregation
priest
blocks.amharic: መምህራ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ሆይ ከቀዳማዊ አብ ጋራ አንድ የምትሆን፤ ንጹሕ የሚሆን የአብ ቃል፤ የማሕየዊ መንፈስ ቅዱስም ቃል፤ ከሰማያት የወረድህ የሕይወት ኅብስት አንተ ነህ።። ስለ ዓለሙ መዳን ነፍሮ የሊለበት መሥዋዕት እንድትሆን መናገርን አስቀድመህ።። አሁንም
blocks.english: O my Master, Jesus Christ, co-eternal pure Word of the Father, and Word of the Holy Spirit, the life giver, Thou art the bread of life which didst come down from heaven, and didst foretell that Thou wouldest be the Lamb without Spot for the life of the world. We now pray and beseech of Thine excellent goodness, O lover of man, make Thy

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.amharic:
ከበጎነትህ ቸርነት እንለምናለን እንማልዳለንም።። ሰው ወዳጅ ሆይ ያንተ በሚሆን በዚህ በመንፈሳዊ ጠቦት ሳይ ባፍርነው በዚህ "እማሬ" ኅብስት ሳይና በዚህ "እማሬ" ጽዋ ሳይ ፊትህን ግለጽ።। ይህንን ኅብስት ባርከው ይህንንም ጽዋ አክብረው ሁለቱንም አንጻቸው።።
ይህ "እማሬ"
blocks.english: face to shine upon this bread, and upon this cup, which we have set upon this spiritual ark of Thine. Bless this bread, and hallow this cup, and cleanse them both. And change this bread to become Thy pure body, and what is mingled in this cup to become Thy precious blood, let them be offered for us all for healing and for the salvation

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.amharic:
ንጹሕ ሥጋህን ይሆን ዘንድ ለውጠው።። በዚህ "እማሬ" ጽዋ ውስጥ የተቀዳውም ወይን የከበረ ደምህን ይሁን፤ ለሃሳችንም ያረገ ለነፍሳችንና ለሥጋችን ለልቡናችንም ፈውስ ይሆን ዘንድ።።
አምላካችን ክርስቶስ የሃሳችን ንጉሥ አንተ ነህ።። ከፉ ያለ ምስጋናንና ክብርን ስግደትንም ፃንት እንልካለን።። ቸር ከሚሆን ከሰማያዊ አባትህ ጋራ ካንተ ጋራ ከሚተካከል ከማሕየዊ መንፈስ ቅዱስም ጋራ ዛሬም ዘወትርም ለዘሳለሙ፤ አሜን።
blocks.english: of our soul and our body and our spirit. Thou art the King of us all, Christ our God, and to Thee we send up high praise and glory and worship, with Thy good heavenly Father and the Holy Spirit, the life giver, who is coequal with Thee, both now and ever and world without end. Amen.

blocks.amharic: ያባቶቻችን የሐዋርያት ትእዛዝ ነው። ሰው በልቦናው ቂምንና በቀልን ቅንዓትንና ጠብን በባልንጀራው ላይ በማንም ላይ ቢሆን አይያዝ።
blocks.english: This is the order of our fathers the Apostles: Let none Keep in his heart malice or revenge or envy or hatred towards his neighbor, or towards any other body.
blocks.transliteration: Yabatochachin yeHawaryat ti’ezaz new. Sew be-libonaw qimna beqelna qin’atna tabna be-balenjraw lay be-manim lay bihon ayiyaz.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: በፍርሀት ለእግዚአብሔር ስገዱ።
blocks.english: Worship the Lord with fear.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አቤቱ በፊትህ ወድቀን እንሰግዳለን። እናመሰግንሃለን።
blocks.english: Before you, Lord, we worship, and we glorify you
blocks.speaker: congregation
asst. priest
blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ጌታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ወልድ ዋሕድ የእግዚአብሔር አብ ቃል ማሕየዊ መድኃኒትም በምትሆን በሕማምህ ከእኛ የኃጢአታችንን ሁሉ ማስረያ ያጠፋህ።። ንጹሕን በሚሆን ደቀ መጃሙርትህና በንጹሕን አገልጋዮችህ ፊት እፍ ያልሃቸው መንፈስ ቅዱስን ተቀበሉ፤ ይቅር
blocks.english: Master, Lord Jesus Christ, the Only-begotten Son, the Word of God the Father, who hast broken off from us all the bonds of our sins through Thy life-giving and saving sufferings, who didst breathe upon the face of Thy holy disciples and pure misisters saying to them: Receive the Holy Spirit: whatso-ever men's sins ye remit they are

blocks.speaker: asst. priest
blocks.amharic:
ሃሳቻቸቸው ኃጢአታቸው ይቅርም ሃሃሳቻቸቸው ኃጢአታቸው አይቅርሳቸውም ያልካቸው።።
አሁንም በክብርት ቤተ ክርስቲያንህ ሕልጊዜ የካህነቱን ሥራ ለሚሠሩ ለንጹሕን አገልጋዮችህ አቤቱ አንተ ካህነትን ስጠህ፤ በምድር ሳይ ኃጢአትን ይቅር ይሉ ዘንድ።। ያስሩ ዘንድ የበደልንም ማስረያ ሁሉ
blocks.english:
remitted unto them, and whatsoever sins ye retain they are retained: 
Thou, therefore, O Lord, hast now granted the priesthood to Thy pure ministers that do the priests’ office at all times in Thy holy church that they may remit sin on earth, may bind and loosen all the bonds of iniquity. 
Now again we pray and entreat of Thy goodness, O

blocks.speaker: asst. priest
blocks.amharic:
ይፈቱ ዘንድ።።
አሁንም አቤቱ ሰው ወዳጅ ሆይ፤ ዳግመኛ ከቸርነትህ እንለምናለን እንሻለንም።። ስለነዚህ ስለ ወንዶችም ስለ ሴቶችም ባሮችህ አባቶቻቸና ወንድሞቻቸ እንቶቻቸም ደካማ ስለምሆን ስለ እነም ስለ ባርያህ፤ በቅዱስ መሠዊያህም ፊት ርሳቸውን ዝቅ ስለ አደርጉ
blocks.english: lover of man, on behalf of these Thy servants and handmaids, my fathers and my brothers and my sisters, and also on my own behalf, on me Thy feeble servant, and on behalf of them that bow their heads before Thy holy altar: prepare for us the way of Thy holy altar: prepare for us the way of Thy mercy, break and sever all the bonds of our

blocks.speaker: asst. priest
blocks.amharic:
ሰዎች የምሕረቱህን ጡዳና ጥሪጋልን፤ የኃጢአታቸንን ማስረያም ሁሉ ፈጽመህ አጥፋልን፤ አቤቱ አንትን ዝንበድל በማወቅ ወይም ባለማወቅ በተንኮልም ቢሆን በልቡና ካፍትም ቢሆን በመሥራትም ቢሆን በመናገርም ቢሆን በዕውቀት ማንኛም ቢሆን የሰሙን ድካሙን አንተ ታውቃለህና።።
ቸር ሰው
blocks.english:
sins, whether we have trespassed against Thee, O Lord, wittingly or unwittingly or in deceit or in evilness of heart, whether in deed or in word or through smallness of understanding, for Thou knowest the feebleness of man. 
O good lover of man and Lord of all creation, grant us, O Lord, forgive-
ness of our sins, bless us and purify us

blocks.speaker: asst. priest
blocks.amharic:
ወዳጅ ሆይ የፍቅሬቱ ሁሉ ጌታ አቤቱ የኃጢአታቸንን ሥርዮት ስጠን፤ ባርክን፤ አክብረንም ነጽም የወጣን አድርገን ሕዝቡንም ሁሉ ፍታቸው።። (በዚህ ጊዜ አዲስ የምቅቱን ያስታወስ) ስምህን መፍራትን የተመሉን አድርገን ቅዱስ ፈቃድህንም በመፍራት አጽናን።።
ቸር ሆይ
blocks.english:
and set us free and absolve all Thy people, (here he shall mention those lately dead) and fill us with the fear of
Thy name, and establish us in the doing of Thy holy will. 
O Good, for Thou art our Lord and our God and our Saviour Jesus Christ, to Thee we send glory and honor with Thy good heavenly Father, and the Holy Spirit, the

blocks.speaker: asst. priest
blocks.amharic:
ጌታችንና አምላካችን መድኃኒታችን አንተ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ነህና።። ምስጋናና ክብርን ፃንት እናቀርባለን።። ሰማያዊ ከሚሆን ከቸር አባትህ ጋራ፤ ማሕየዊ ከሚሆን ከመንፈስ ቅዱስም ጋራ ትክክል የሚሆን ዛሬም ዘወትርም ለዘሳለሙ፤ አሜን።።
በዚህ ቀን ያገለገሉህ ባሮችህ ቁስና ዲያቆኑ
blocks.english:
life-giver, who is coequal with Thee, both now and ever and world without end. Amen.
May Thy servants who serve on this day, the priest and the deacon and the clergy and all the people, and I myself Thy poor servant, be absolved and set free and cleansed out of the mouth of the Holy Trinity, the Father and the Son and the Holy Spirit,

blocks.speaker: asst. priest
blocks.amharic: ካህናቱም (ካህናቱን ይባርክ) ሕዝቡም ሁሉ (ሕዝቡን ይባርክ) እነም ድኃው ባርያህ (ሩሱን ይባርክ) የተፈቱና ነጻ የወጡ ይኑጹ።። ልዩ ሃሥት በሚሆን በአብ በወልድ በመንፈስ ቅዱስ አፍ ሕዋርያት በሰቦሳሊት በቅድስት ቤተ ክርስቲያን አፍ በዓሥሩ አምስቱ ነቢያት አፍ
blocks.english: and out of the mouth of the one holy apostolic church, and out of the mouths of the fifteen prophets, and out of the mouths of the twelve apostles, and out of the mouths of the seventy-two disciples the ministers, and out of the mouth of the speaker of divinity, the evangelist Mark the apostle and martyr: and out of the mouths of the

blocks.speaker: asst. priest
blocks.amharic:
በዓሥሩ ሁለቱ ሕዋርያት አፍ፤ ሥልጣን አገልጋዮች በሃኑ በሳባ ሁሉቱ አርድእት አፍ መልኮትን በትናገሬ ወንጌላዊ ሕዋርያና ሰማዕቱም በሃን በማርቆስ አፍ።
ንጹሕ ክቡር አባት በሚሆን በጳጳሳቱ አለቃ በሳዊሮስና በቅዱስ ዲዮስቆሮስ በቅዱስ አትናቴዎስም በቅዱስ ዮሐንስ አፈ ወርቅና
blocks.english: honored Patriarchs St. Severus and St. Dioscorus and St. Athanasius ans St. John Chrysostom and St. Cyril and St. Gregory and St. Basil: and out of the mouths of 318 orthodox that assembled in Nicaea to condemn Arius, and out of the mouths of the 150 that assembled in Constantinople to condemn Macedonius, and out of the mouths of the 200

blocks.speaker: asst. priest
blocks.amharic:
በቅዱስ ቄርሎስ በቅዱስ ጎርጎርዮስና በቅዱስ ባስልዮስ ቃል።།
አርዮስን ለማውገዝ በኒቂያ በትሰቦሳቡ ሃይማኖታቸው በቀና ቢሆን ሃሥስ ምዕት ዐሠሩ ሦሥንት ሊቀዉንትም ቃል።። መቅዶንዮስን ለማውገዝ በቁስጥንጥንያ በትሰቦሳቡ ሃሥምቱ ዐሠሩ ሊቀዉንትም ቃል።། ንስጥሮስን ለማውገዝ በኤፌሶን በትሰቦሳቡ ሁለት ምዕት ሊቀዉንትም ቃል በክቡር የሊቃነ ጳጳሳቱ አለቃ በአባ .... ንዑድ ክቡር በሚሆን ሊቀ ጳጳሳቻችን አባ ...... ቃል ድኃ ክቡር በሚሆን ሊቀ ጳጳሳቸን አባ ...... ቃል ከኔም በኃጥኡ ሊቀ ጳጳሳቸን አባ .... ቃል ይቱ ክቡር
blocks.english: that assembled in Ephesus to condemn Nestor, and out of the mouth of the honored Patriarch Abba .... and the blessed Archbishop Abba ......., and out of the mouth of me also the sinful and miserable and poor — may they be absolved and set free, and out of the Mouth of our Lady holy Mary, of twofold virginity, mother of God, the new loom;

blocks.speaker: asst. priest
blocks.amharic:
በሚሆን ሊቀ ጳጳሳቸን አባ ..... ቃል ድኃ ምስኪን በምሆን በኔም ቃል የተፈቱ ነጻም የወጡ ይኑጹ።།
አምሳክን በወለዶች በሁለት ወገን ድንግል ባዲሲቱ መሃሪያ በክብርት እመቤታችን በማርያም ቃል።።
የቅዱስም ስምህ ምስጋና ቡሩክ ፍጹም ነውና፤ ልዩ ሃሥት የምትሆን አብ ወልድ መንፈስ ቅዱስ ሆይ ዛሬም ዘወትርም ለዘሳለሙ አሜን።
blocks.english: For Thy holy name is blessed and full of glory, O Holy Trinity, Father and Son and Holy Spirit, both now and ever and world without end. Amen.

blocks.amharic: አንድ ስለምታደርግ ሥጋውና ደሙ፤ እግዚአብሔር በይቅርታው አንድ ያደርጋን ዘንድ ሰላምን እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english:
For the peacful holy things we beseech, that God may grant us peace
through His mercy.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር የሱን ሃይማኖት ብንጹሕ እንድንጠብቅ ይሰጠን ዘንድ ስለ ሃይማኖታችን እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english:
For our Faith we beseech, that God may grant us to keep the faith in
purity.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: እስከ ፍጻሜያችን ድረስ እግዚአብሔር በመንፈስ ቅዱስ አንድነት ይጠብቀን ዘንድ ስለ አንድነታችን እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english:
For our congregation we beseech, that God may keep us unto the end in
the communion of the Holy Spirit.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: በመከራችን ሁሉ እግዚአብሔር የትዕግሥትን ፍጻሜ ይሰጠን ዘንድ ስለ ነፍሳችን ትዕግሥት እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english:
For patience of soul we beseech, that God may vouchsafe us perfect pa-
tience in all our tribulation.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ቅዱሳን ስለሚሆን ነቢያት ከሳቸው ጋራ እግዚአብሔር ይቆጥረን ዘንድ እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the holy prophets we beseech, that God may number us with them.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: እነሱ ደስ እንዳሰኛቸ ደስ ልናሰኛው እግዚአብሔር (ማገልገሉን) ይሰጠን ዘንድ ዕድል ፈንታቸውንም ያድለን ዘንድ አገልጋዮች ስለሚሆን ሕዋርያት እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english:
For the ministering Apostles we beseech, that God may grant us to be
wellpleasing even as they were well pleasing, and apportion unto us a lot with
them.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር ለኛ የሰማዕቱትን ሥራ ይሰጠን ዘንድ ቅዱሳን ስለሚሆን ሰማዕታት እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english:
For the Holy martyrs we beseech, that God may grant us to perfect the
same conversation.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: የቤተ ክርስቲያን አገልጋዮች እነሱ ናቸውና እግዚአብሔር እነሱን ለረጅም ወራት ይሰጠን ዘንድ ያለ ነፍሮና ሃኑው በዕውቀት የሃይማኖትን ቃል ያቁኑ ዘንድ ስለ ርእሰ ሊቃነ ጳጳሳቱ ስለ አባ ..... ብጹዕ ስለሚሆን ስለ ሊቀ ጳጳሳቻችንም ስለ አባ .... እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For our Patriarch Abba .... and the blessed Archbishop Abba ... we beseech, that God grant them length of days to be over us, that with understanding they may rightly speak the word of faith in purity without spot for that they are the defenders of the church.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: የካህነቱን ሥልጣን ከእነሱ እግዚአብሔር እንዳያርቅ መትጋትን እሱን መፍራትንም እስከ ፍጻሜ ይሰጥልን ዘንድ ድካማቸውንም ይቀበል ዘንድ ስለ ቃሳውስት እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the priests we beseech, that God may never take from them the spirit of priesthood, and may give them the grace of zeal and fear of Him unto the end and accept their labor.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ፈጹሞ ሊቆጠኑ መፈጠሮን እግዚአብሔር ይሰጣቸው ዘንድ በቅድስናም ይቅርቡ ዘንድ ድካማቸውንና ፍቅራቸውንም ያስብ ዘንድ ስለ ዲያቆናት እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the deacons we beseech, that God may grant them to run a perfect course, and draw them nigh unto Him in holiness, and remember their labor and their love.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: የሃይማኖታቸውን ትጋት ሊፈጹሙ እግዚአብሔር ይሰጣቸው ዘንድ ስለ ንፍቅ ዲያቆናት ስለ አንባቢዮችም ስለ መዘምራንም እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the assistant deacons and the anagnosts and the singers we beseech, that God may grant them to perfect the diligence of their faith.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ልመናቸውን ይሰማቸው ዘንድ ይልቀንም የመንፈስ ቅዱስን ሂብት በልቡናቸው ያሳድርባቸው ዘንድ ድካማቸውንም ይቀበል ዘንድ ስለ ባልቴቶች ሬዳትም ስለሴሳቻው እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the widows and the bereaved we beseech, that God may hear their prayers and vouchsafe them abundantly in their hearts the grace of the Holy Spirit and accept their labor.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር የድንግላናቸውን ዋጋ (አክሊል) ይሰጣቸው ዘንድ ለእግዚአብሔርም ወንዶችም ሴቶች ልጆች ይሆኑት ዘንድ ድካማቸውንም ይቀበል ዘንድ ስለ ድንግል እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the virgins we beseech, that God may grant them the crown of virginity, and that they may be unto God sons and daughters and that He may accept their labor.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: በምታገሃቸው ዋጋቸውን ይቀበሉ ዘንድ እግዚአብሔር እንዲሰጣቸው ስለ ሚታገሁ ሰዎች እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For those who suffer patiently we beseech, that God grant them to receive their rewards through patience.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: በንጹሕና ሃኑው ይጠብቅ ዘንድ እግዚአብሔር ፍጹም ሃይማኖትን እንዲሰጣቸው ስለ ሕዝባውያንና ስለ መሃይምናን እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the laity and faithful we beseech, that God may grant them complete faith which they may keep in purity.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: በጎውን ዕድል ኃጢአትን ለማስተሥረይ ሁለተኛ መወልድ የሚጎኙቶን ሕፍቦት እግዚአብሔር ይሰጣቸው ዘንድ በቅድስት ሥሳሊም ማንትም ያክብራቸው ያቅሙቸው ዘንድ ስለ ንኡስ ክርስቲያን እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the catechumens we beseech, that God may grant them a good portion and the washing of regeneration for the remission of sin, and seal them with the seal of the Holy Trinity.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: በዘሙን ፍጹም ሰላምን እግዚአብሔር ይሰጠው ዘንድ ስለ (መሪያችን) ......... እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For our leader ....... we beseech, that God may vouchsafe him much peace in his days.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ዕውቀትን እሱን መፍራትንም እግዚአብሔር ይሰጣቸው ዘንድ ስለ መኳንንትና ሥልጣን ስሳቻው እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the rulers and those in authority we beseech, that God may grant them of His wisdom and His fear.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ስለ ዓለሙ ሁሉ እግዚአብሔር ማሳብን ያስቀድሙ ዘንድ ሊያንዳንዱም የሚያስፈልጋቸውን ያማሩን የሚሻቸውንም ያስብ ዘንድ ስለ ዓለም ሁሉ እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the whole world we beseech, that God should hasten His purpose and put into the mind of all and each to desire that which is good and expedient.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር ይቅርታ ባለው ቀኝ መርቱ በፍቅርና በደጎንነት ወደ ማደሪያቸው ይምልሳቸው ዘንድ በባሕርና በደረቅ ስለሚሄዱ ሰዎች እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For them that travel by sea and by land we beseech, that God should guide them with a merciful right hand and let them enter their home in safety and peace.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር የልት የልት ምሃቻቸውን ይሰጣቸው ዘንድ ስለ ተራቡና ስለ ተጠሙ ሰዎች እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the hungry and the thirsty we beseech, that God should grant them their daily food.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር ፈጹሞ ያረጋጋቸው ዘንድ ስለ አዞኑና ስለ ተከዙ ሰዎች እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the sad and the sorrowful we beseech, that God may give them perfect consolation.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር ከእሥራታቸው ይፈታቸው ዘንድ ስለ ታሠሩ ሰዎች እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the prisoners we beseech, that God may loose them from their bonds.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር በሰላም ወደ አገራቸው ይመልሳቸው ዘንድ ስለ ተሳደሩ ሰዎች እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the captives, we beseech, that God may restore them to their country in peace.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር ትዕግሥትን በጎ ትምህርትንም ይሰጣቸው ዘንድ የድካማቸውንም ፍጹም ዋጋ ይሰጣቸው ዘንድ ስለ ተሰደዱ ሰዎች እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For those who were sent away we beseech, that God should grant them patience and good instruction, and give them complete reward for their labor.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር ፈጥኖ ያድናቸው ዘንድ ይቅርታውንና ቸርነቱንም ይልካላቸው ዘንድ ስለ ታመሙትና ስለ ድውያኑ እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the sick and the diseased we beseech, that God should heal them speedily and send upon them mercy and compassion.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ከቅድስት ቤተ ክርስቲያን ወገን ስለ ሞቱ ሰዎች እግዚአብሔር የዕረፍት ቦታ ይሰጣቸው ዘንድ እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For those who have fallen asleep in his holy church we beseech, that God may vouchsafe them a place of rest.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር እንዳይቀማቸው ከመዓቱም ተመልሶ ፍጹም ዕረፍትን ይሰጣቸው ዘንድ ስለ በደሉ አባታቻችንና ወንድማቻችን እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For those who have sinned, our fathers and our brothers we beseech, that God cherish not anger against them, but grant them rest and relief from His wrath.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: በሚሻቦት ቦታ እግዚአብሔር ዝናሙን ያዘንም ዘንድ ስለ ዝናም እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the rains we beseech, that God may send rain on the place that need it.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: የወንኙን ውኃ ምሳልንብለን እግዚአብሔር እነሱን እስከ ልካቸውና እስከ ወሰናቸው ይመሳ ዘንድ ስለ ወንዙ ውኃ እንማልዳለን።
blocks.english: For the waters of the rivers we beseech, that God should fill them unto their due measure and bounds.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ለዘርና ለመከር ሊሆን እግዚአብሔር ለምድር ፍሬዎን ይሰጣት ዘንድ ስለ ምድር ፍሬ እንማልዳለን።። በጸሎት የምንለምንና የምንማልድ ሃሳችንንም በሰላም በመንፈስ ይጠብቅን፤ ፍቅርንም ይስጠን፤ ዓይነ ልቡናችንንም ያበሩልን።። ፈቃዱም ሆኖ ጸሎታችንን ይቀበል ዘንድ ቀርቦን እግዚአብሔርን እንለምነው።
blocks.english: For the fruits of the earth we beseech, that God may grant to the earth her fruit for sowing and for harvest. And all of us who ask and beseech in prayer, may He cover us with the spirit of peace, and give us grace, and enlighten the eyes of our hearts. Let us draw nigh and ask God to accept our prayers according to His will.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Amen Kyrie eleison Lord have mercy on us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: አውቀን በሃብቱ እናድግ ዘንድ በእርሱም ስም እንመካ ዘንድ በነቢያት በሕዋፐርያትም መሠረት ሳይ እንታነጽ ዘንድ እንግዲህ በመንፈስ ቅዱስ እንኖሃ።። ቀርቦን አምላካችን እግዚአብሔርን እንለምነው፤ ወዳ ጸሎታችንን ይቀበል ዘንድ።
blocks.english: Let us therefore rise in the Holy Spirit, growing in His grace, with understanding, glorying in His name and built upon the foundation of the prophets and the apostles. Let us draw nigh and ask the Lord God to accept our prayers according to His will.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.english: Lord have mercy upon us.

blocks.geez: ለአብ፣ ወወልድ፣ ወመንፈስ ቅዱስ እንዘ ሠለስቱ አሐዱ። (፫ ጊዜ)

blocks.english: Holy church, dwellingplace of the godhead.

blocks.english: Virgin Mary, mother of God, Antee wi'itu.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: አንቺ ነሽ።
blocks.english: Thou art
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ማዕጠንት ዘወርቅ እንተ ፆርኪ ፍሕመ እሳተ ቡሩክ ዘነሥኣ እመቅደስ ዘይሠሪ ኃጢአተ ወይደመስስ ጌጋየ ። ዝውእቱ ዘእግዚአብሔር ቃል ዘተሰብአ እምኔኪ ዘአዕረገ ለአቡሁ ርእሶ ዕጣነ ወመሥዋዕተ ሥሙረ። ንሰግድ ለከ ክርስቶስ ምስለ አቡከ ኄር ሰማያዊ ወመንፈስከ ቅዱስ ማሕየዊ እስመ መጻእከ ወአድኀንከነ።
blocks.amharic: ቡሩክ ከቤተ መቅደስ የተቀበላት የወርቅ ጽና አንቺ ነሽ፣ የእሳት ፍሕም የያዝሽ፣ ኃጢአትን የሚያስተሰርይ፤ በደልንም የሚያጠፋ። ይኸውም ካንቺ ሰው የሆነው የእግዚአብሔር ቃል ነው። ራሱን ያማረ ዕጣንና መሥዋዕት አድርጎ ለአባቱ ያቀረበ። ክርስቶስ ሆይ! ሰማያዊ ከሚሆን ከቸር ራሱን ያማረ ዕጣንና መሥዋዕት አድርጎ ለአባቱ ያቀረበ። ክርስቶስ ሆይ! ሰማያዊ ከሚሆን ከቸር
blocks.english: The golden censer which didst bear the coal of fire which the blessed took from the sanctuary, and which forgiveth sin and blotteth out error, who is God's Word that was, made man from thee, who offered himself to his Father for incense and an acceptable sacrifice. We worship Thee, Christ, with Thy good heavenly Father and Thy Holy Spirit, the life-giver, for Thou didst come and save us.
blocks.transliteration: Ma'itente zewerq inte tsorqee fihime isate buruk zenesi'a imeqdesi zeyseri hati'yat Weyidemesis gégaye. Nisegid leke Kiristos misle abuke hér semayawee wemenfesike qidus mahiyewee isme metsa'ike we'adhankene.
