blocks.english: Glory and honor are meet to he Holy Trinity,
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ለአብ ለወልድ ለመንፈስ ቅዱስ ይገባቸዋል
blocks.english: It is due unto the Father, the son, and the Holy Spirit
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: አብ ወወልድ ወመንፈስ ቅዱስ ኵሎ ጊዜ ይእዜኒ ወዘልፈኒ ወለዓለመ ዓለም
blocks.amharic: ሁል ጊዜ ክብር ምስጋና ይገባቸዋል ዛሬም ዘወትርም ለዘለዓለሙ
blocks.english: the Father and the Son and the Holy Spirit at all times. Both now and ever and world without end. Amen.
blocks.transliteration: Ab wewold wemenfes kidus kulo gize yi’izeni wezelfeni wele’aleme alem
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: አሜን
blocks.english: Amem
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ጌታችንንና መድኃኒታችንን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስን የማይወደው የመንፈስ ቅዱስ ማዳሪያ በሁለት ወገን ድንግል ከምትሆን ከቅድስት ማርያም መወለዱንም የማያምን ሰው ሁሱ እንግዳ እስከሚሆን ምጽአቱ ድረሰ ጳውሎስ እንደ ተናገረ የተለየ ይሁን።
blocks.english: Everyone that loves not our Lord and Saviour Jesus Christ, and believes not in his birth from holy Mary , of twofold virginity, the ark of the Holy Spirit, until his coming again, let him be "anathema" as Paul said
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: ወደ ኤፌሶን ሰዎች
blocks.english: 1st Reading: Ephesians Ch. 6 : 1 - 9

blocks.amharic: ቅድስት በምትሆን በጽርሐ ጽዮን በሐዋርያት ላይ የወረደው የአብ በረከት የወልድም ፍቅር የመንፈስ ቅዱስም ሁበት በሁላችሁም ላይ ይውረድ ዕፅፍ ድርብም ይሁን።
blocks.english: The blessing of the Father and the Love of the Son and the gift of the Holy Spirit who came down upon the apostles in the upper room of holy Zion, in like sort come down and be multiplied upon me and all of you
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.geez: ቅዱስ ሐዋርያ ጳውሎስ ሠናየ መልእክት ፈዋሴ ዱያን ዘነሣእከ አክሊለ ሰአል ወጸሊ በእንቲኣነ ያድኅን ነፍሳተነ በብዛኅ ሣህሉ ወምሕረቱ በእንተ ስሙ ቅዱስ።
blocks.amharic: ሐዋርያ ቅዱስ ጳውልስ መልእክትህ የበጀ፣ የታመሙትን ያዳንክ፣ አክሊልን የተቀበልህ፤ ስለእኛ ለምንልን፣ ጸልይልን። ስለቅዱስ ስሙ ብሎ በቸርነቱ በይቅርታው ብዛት ሰውነታችንን ያድነን ዘንድ።
blocks.english: Holy Apostle Paul, good messenger, healer of the sick, who hast received the crown, ask and pray for us in order that He may save our souls in the multitude of His mercies and in His pity for His holy name's sake.
blocks.transliteration: Qidus hawariya Pawulos senaye mel'ikti fewasé duyane zenesa'ike akleele se'al wetselee be'intee'ane yadihin nefsatene bebiziha sahilu wemihretu be'inte simu qidus.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ለጸሎት ተነሡ።
blocks.english: Stand up for prayer.
blocks.speaker: asst. deacon

blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Lord have mercy upon us.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ሰላም ለሁላችሁም።
blocks.english: Peace be unto you all.
blocks.speaker: asst. priest

blocks.amharic: ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: And with Your Spirit.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: የኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ሕዋርያውና ረድኡ ከሚሆን ከ... መልእክት የተገኘ ቃል ይህ ነው። ጸሎቱና በረከቱ በሁላችን ላይ ይኑር። ለዘለዓለሙ አሜን።
blocks.english: The word from the epistle of ... disciple and apostle of our Lord Jesus Christ, his prayer and blessing be with us all forever, Amen
blocks.speaker: asst. deacon

blocks.amharic: ወደ ኤፌሶን ሰዎች
blocks.english: 1st Reading: Ephesians Ch. 6 : 1 - 9

blocks.amharic: ወንድሞቼ ይህን ዓለም አትውደዱት በዓለሙ ውስጥ ያለውንም። ዓለሙም ኃላፊ ነው። ፈቃዱም ኃላፊ ነው። ሁሉም ኃላፊ ነውና።
blocks.english: O my brothers, love not the world neither the things that are in the world. The world passes away and the lust thereof, for all is passing.
blocks.speaker: asst. deacon

blocks.geez: ቅዱስ ሥሉስ ዘኅቡር ህላዌከ ዕቀብ ማኅበረነ በእንተ ቅዱሳን ኅሩያን አርዳኢከ ናዝዘነ በሣህልከ በእንተ ቅዱስ ስምከ።
blocks.amharic: ባሕርይህ አንድ የሚሆን፣ በሦስትነት ያለህ ቅዱስ ሆይ! አንድነታችንን ጠብቅልን፤ ስለተመረጡ ክቡራን ደቀመዛሙርትህ፤ ሰለቅዱስ ስምህም ብለህ በይቅርታህ አረጋጋን።
blocks.english: Holy con substantial Trinity, preserve our congregation for Your holy elect disciples' sake: comfort us in Your mercy, for Your holy name's sake.
blocks.transliteration: Qidus silus zehibur hilawéke iqeb mahiberene be'inte qidusan hiruyan arda'eeke nazizene besahilike be'inteqidus simike.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ለጸሎት ተነሡ።
blocks.english: Stand up for prayer.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Lord have mercy upon us.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ሰላም ለሁላችሁም።
blocks.english: Peace be unto you all.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: And with Your Spirit.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ንጹሐን ከሚሆኑ ከሕግ ምንጮት የተገኘ ጥሩ ምንጭ ይኸውም የሐዋርያት የሥራቸው ነገር ነው። የጸሎታቸው በረከት ከሁላችን ጋር ይሁን ለዘለዓለሙ አሜን ።
blocks.english: The word from the epistle of ... disciple and apostle of our Lord Jesus Christ, his prayer and blessing be with us all forever, Amen
blocks.speaker: asst. priest

blocks.amharic: ወደ ኤፌሶን ሰዎች
blocks.english: 1st Reading: Ephesians Ch. 6 : 1 - 9

blocks.amharic: የእግዚአብሔር ቃል ፈጽሞ መላ። ከፍ ከፍ አለ። በቅድስት ቤት ክርስቲያንም በዝቶ ተጨመረ። ምስጋና ገንዘቡ በሚሆን በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ያመኑት ሕዝብም በዙ። ለዘለዓለሙ አሜን።
blocks.english: Full and great and exalted is the Word of God, and it has increased in the holy church, and many are they that believe in our Lord Jesus Christ to whom be glory, world without end, Amen.
blocks.speaker: asst. priest

blocks.geez: ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ አንተ ወልድ ዋሕድ ዘአንተ ቃለ አብ ሕያው። ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ አንተ መንፈስ ቅዱስ ዘተአምር ኵሎ።
blocks.amharic: የሕያው አብ ቃል ተቀዳሚ ተከታይ የሌለህ ወልድ ሆይ፣ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ አንተ ነህ። ሁሉን የምታውቅ መንፈስ ቅዱስ ሆይ! ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ አንተ ነህ።
blocks.english: Holy Holy Holy are You, only-begotten Son, who are the Word of the living Father. Holy Holy Holy are You, Holy Spirit who knows all things.
blocks.transliteration: Qidus qidus qidus ante weld wahid ze'ante qal Ab hiyaw. Qidus qidus qidus ante Menfes Qidus zete'amir kwulo.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ለጸሎት ተነሡ።
blocks.english: Stand up for prayer.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Lord have mercy upon us.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ሰላም ለሁላችሁም።
blocks.english: Peace be unto you all.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: And with Your Spirit.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: አሜን ኪርያላይሶን እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.english: Pray for …,
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ጸልዩ በእንተ ሰላመ ቤተ ክርስቲያን አሐቲ ቅድስት ጉባኤ እንተ ሐዋርያት ርትዕት በኀበ እግዚአብሔር
blocks.amharic: ሐዋርያት ለሰበሰቧት በእግዚአብሔር ዘንድ ስለቀናች ክብርት ስለምትሆን አንዲት ቤተ ክርስቲያን ስላም ጸልዩ።
blocks.english: Pray for the peace of the one holy apostolic church orthodox in the Lord.
blocks.transliteration: Tseliyu be'inte selame béte kiristeeyan ahatee qidist guba'é inte hawariyat riti'it behabe Igzee'abihér.
blocks.speaker: deacon
deacon
blocks.geez: ፃኡ ንኡሰ ክርስቲያን። ዘሀገር ዓባይ ኢትዮጵያ ወዲበ ርእሰ ሀገረ አበዊነ ብፁዕ
blocks.amharic: የክርስቲያን ታናናሾች በሰላም ሂዱ። ተንሥኡ ለጸሎት ፖለጸሎት ተነሡ። እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ። አቤቱ ይቅር በለን። ሰላም ለኵልክሙ። ሰላም ለሁላችሁም። ምስለ መንፈስከ። ከመንፈስህ ጋራ። ጸልዩ በእንተ ሰላመ ቤተ ክርስቲያን አሐቲ ቅድስት ጉባኤ እንተ ሐዋርያት ርትዕት በኀበ እግዚአብሔር ሐዋርያት ለሰበሰቡዋት በእግዚአብሔር ዘንድ ስለቀናች ክብርት ስለምትሆን አንዲት ቤተ ክርስቲያን ስላም ጸልዩ። ኪርያላይሶን። ጸልዩ በእንተ ርእሰ ሊቃነ ጳጳሳት አባ ማትያስ እግዚእነ ርእሰ ሊቃነ ጳጳሳት ብፁዕ ስለሚሆን ስለ ሊቀ ጳጳሳቱ ስለ አባ ማትያስ
blocks.english: Tsasu ni'use kiristeeyan. Go forth, ye catechumens. Stand up for prayer. Lord have mercy upon us. Peace be unto you all. And with Thy spirit. Pray for the peace of the one holy apostolic church orthodox in the Lord. Pray for the Patriarch Abba Matthias lord chief of the bishops of the great country Ethiopia, and for the blessed Primate
blocks.transliteration: Tensi'u letselot Igzee'o tesahalene. Selam lekwulikimu. Misle menfesike. Tseliyu be'inte selame béte kiristeeyan ahatee qidist guba'é inte hawariyat riti'it behabe Igzee'abihér.

blocks.speaker: deacon
blocks.geez: ሊቀ ጳጳስነ አባ ጴጥሮስ ወኵሎሙ ኤጲስ ቆጶሳት ቀሳውስት ወዲያቆናት ርቱዓነ ሃይማኖት።
blocks.amharic: የደገኛዩቱ አገር ኢትዮጵያ ፓትርያርክ የሊቃነ ጳጳሳቱ አለቃ ጌታ ስለሚሆን ባባቶቻችን አገርም ብፁዕ ስለሚሆን ስለ አባ ጴጥሮስ ሃይማኖታቸው ስለ ቀና ስለ ኤጲስ ቆጶሳቱ ስለ ቀሳውስቱና ስለ ዲያቆናቱም ሁሉ ጸልዩ።
blocks.english: of the country of our fathers Abba Peter and all wekwulomu épees qoposat qesawist wedeeyaqonat ritu'ane haymanot. the orthodox bishops, priests and deacons.
blocks.transliteration: Kyrie eleison. Tseliyu be'inte ri'ise leeqane papasat Abba Matyas Egziene ri'ise leeqane papasat zehager abayi Ethiopia wedeebe ri'ise hagere abeweene bisu'i leeqe papasine abba Petros

blocks.amharic: ደኅንነትን የምንለምንሽ ክብርን የተመላሽ ሆይ ደስ ይበልሽ።
blocks.english: Rejoice, O thou of whom we ask healing, O holy, full of honor, Rejoice.
blocks.transliteration: Dihninetin yeminleminish kibrin yetemelash hoy des yibelish
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ደስ ይበልሽ።
blocks.english: Rejoice.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ሁልጊዜ ድንግል የምትሆኝ አምላክን የወለድሽ የክርስቶስ እናት ሆይ ኃጢአታችንን ያስተሠርይልን ዘንድ ወደ ልጅሽ ወደ ወዳጅሽ ወደ ላይ ጸሎታችንን አሳርጊ።
blocks.english: Ever-virgin, parent of God, mother of Christ, offer up our prayer on high to your beloved Son that He may forgive us our sin.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: አሜን።
blocks.english: Amen.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: በእውነት የጽድቅ ብርሃን የሚሆን አምላካችንን ክርስቶስን የወለድሽልን (ንጽሕት) ሆይ ደስ ይበልሽ።
blocks.english: Rejoice, O thou who didst bear for us the very light of righteousness, even Christ our God:
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ደስ ይበልሽ።
blocks.english: Rejoice.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ንጽሕት ድንግል ሆይ ለነፍሳችን ይቅርታን ያደርግልን ዘንድ ኃጢአታችንንም ያስተሠርይልን ዘንድ ወደ ጌታችን ለምኝልን።
blocks.english: O Virgin pure, plead for us unto our Lord that He may have mercy upon our souls and forgive us our sins.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ለምኝልን።
blocks.english: Plead for us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: በእውነት ለሰው ወገን አማላጅ የምትሆኝ አምላክን የወለድሽ ንጽሕት ቅድስት ድንግል ማርያም ሆይ ደስ ይበልሽ።
blocks.english: Rejoice, O Virgin Mary, parent of God, holy and pure, very pleader for the race of mankind;
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ደስ ይበልሽ።
blocks.english: Rejoice.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: የኃጢአታችንን ሥርየት ይሰጠን ዘንድ በልጅሽ በክርስቶስ ፊት ለምኝልን።
blocks.english: Plead for us before Christ thy Son, that He may vouchsafe us remission of our sins.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ለምኝልን።
blocks.english: Plead for us
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: በእውነት ንግሥት የምትሆኝ ንጽሕት ድንግል ሆይ ደስ ይበልሽ።
blocks.english: Rejoice, O Virgin pure, very Queen;
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ደስ ይበልሽ።
blocks.english: Rejoice.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.english: Rejoice, O pride of our kind;
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ደስ ይበልሽ።
blocks.english: Rejoice.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: አምላካችንን አማኑኤልን የወለድሽልን ሆይ ደስ ይበልሽ።
blocks.english: Rejoice, O thou that barest for us Emmanuel our God.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ደስ ይበልሽ።
blocks.english: Rejoice.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: በጌታችን በኢየሱስ ፊት እውነተኛ አስታራቂ ሆነሽ ታስቢን ዘንድ እንለምንሻለን። ለነፍሳችን ይቅርታን ያደርግልን ዘንድ ኃጢአታችንንም ያስተሠርይልን ዘንድ።
blocks.english: We ask thee to remember us, O true Mediatrix, before our Lord Jesus Christ that He may have mercy upon our souls and forgive us our sins.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.english: Amen.
blocks.speaker: congregation

title.english: The angel went in unto her

blocks.geez: አ መልአክ ኀቤሃ ወቆመ ቅድሜሃ ወይቤላ ተፈሥሒ ተፈሥሒ ተፈሥሒ ኦ ምልዕት ጸጋ።ስ
blocks.amharic: መልአክ ወደርስዋ ገብቶ በፊቷ ቆሞ ጸጋን የተመላሸ ሆይ ደስ ይበልሽ አላት።
blocks.english: The angel went in unto her and stood in front of her and said to her: Rejoice, rejoice, rejoice, You who are full of grace.
blocks.transliteration: O meli'ak habéha weqome qidméha weyibéla tefesihee tefesihee tefesihee o mil'ate Íega.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: እግዚኣብሔር ካንቺ ጋራ ነው።
blocks.english: The Lord is with thee.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ከሴቶች ተለይተሽ የተባረክሽ ናሽ።
blocks.english: Blessed are you among women.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: የማኅፀንሽም ፍሬ የተባረክ ነው።
blocks.english: And blessed is the fruit of your womb.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ከልጅሽ ከክርስቶስ ዘንድ ለምኝልን።
blocks.english: Pray for us to Christ your Son.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ኃጢኣታችንን ያስተሥርይልን ዘንድ።
blocks.english: To forgive us our sins.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ለጸሎት ተነሡ።
blocks.english: Stand up for prayer.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Lord have mercy upon us.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ሰላም ለሁላችሁም።
blocks.english: Peace be unto you all.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: And with Your Spirit.
blocks.speaker: congregation

title.english: This is the time of blessing

blocks.geez: ዝውእቱ ጊዜ ባርኮት ወዝውእቱ ጊዜ ዕጣን ኅሩይ ጊዜ ሰብሖቱ ለመድኃኒነ መፍቀሬ ሰብእ ክርስቶስ።
blocks.amharic: ይህ የማመስገን ጊዜ ነው፣ የተመረጠ የዕጣን ጊዜም ነው፣ ሰውን የሚወድ መድኃኒታችን ክርስቶስ የሚመሰገንበት ጊዜ ነው።
blocks.english: This is the time of blessing; this is the time of chosen incense, the time of the praise of our Savior, lover of man, Christ.
blocks.transliteration: Ziwi'itu geezé barkot wez wi'itu geezé itan hiruy geezé sebihotu lemedhaneene mefeqeré seb'i kiristos.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ዕጣን ይእቲ ማርያም ዕጣን ውእቱ እስመ ዘውስተ ከርሣ ዘይትሜዐዝ እምኵሉ ዕጣን ዘወለደቶ መጽአ ወአድኀነነ።
blocks.amharic: ማርያም ዕጣን ናት፣ በማኅፀንዋ ያደረው ዕጣን እርሱ ነው። ከዕጣን ሁሉ የሚሸት ነውና፣ የወለደችው መጥቶ አዳነን።
blocks.english: Mary is the incense, and the incense is He, because He who was in her womb is more fragrant than all chosen incense. He whom she bare came and saved us.
blocks.transliteration: Itan yi'itee Mariam iTan wi'itu isme zewiste kersa zeyitimé'az imkwulu iTan zeweledeto metsi'a we'adhanene.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ዕፍረት ምዑዝ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ንዑ ንስግድ ሎቱ ወንዕቀብ ትእዛዛቲሁ ከመ ይሥረይ ለነ ኃጣውኢነ።
blocks.amharic: መዓዛ ያለው ሽቱ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ነው። እንስገድለት ዘንድ ኑ! ትእዛዞቹንም እንጠብቅ ኃጢአታችንን ይቅር ይለን ዘንድ።
blocks.english: The fragrant ointment is Jesus Christ. O come let us worship Him and keep His commandments that He may forgive us our sins.
blocks.transliteration: Ireft mi'uz Eeyesus Kiristos ni'u nisigid lotu weni'iqeb ti'izazateehu keme yisirey lene haTaw'eene.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ተውህቦ ምሕረት ለሚካኤል ወብሥራት ለገብርኤል ወሀብተ ሰማያት ለማርያም ድንግል።
blocks.amharic: ምሕረት ለሚካኤል ተሰጠው። ማብሠር ለገብርኤል፣ ሰማያዊ ሀብትም ለድንግል ማርያም።
blocks.english: To Michael was given mercy, and glad tidings to Gabriel, and a heavenly gift to the Virgin Mary.
blocks.transliteration: Tewihibo mihiret leMeeka'él webisrat leGebri'él wehabte semayat leMariam Dingil.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ተውህቦ ልቡና ለዳዊት ወጥበብ ለሰሎሞን ወቀርነ ቅብዕ ለሳሙኤል እስመ ውእቱ ዘይቀብዕ ነገሥተ።
blocks.amharic: ልቦና ለዳዊት ተሰጠው። ጥበብ ለሰሎሞን። የሽቱ ቀንድም ለሳሙኤል ንጉሦችን የቀባ ነውና።
blocks.english: To David was given understanding, and wisdom to Solomon, and an horn of oil to Samuel for he was the anointer of kings.
blocks.transliteration: Tewihibo libuna leDaweet weTibeb leSelomon weqerine qib'I leSamu'el isme wi'itu zeyiqbi'a negeste.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ተውህቦ መራኁት ለአቡነ ጴጥሮስ ወድንግልና ለዮሐንስ ወመልእክት ለአቡነ ጳውሎስ እስመ ውእቱ ብርሃና ለቤተ ክርስቲያን።
blocks.amharic: ሥልጣን ለአባታችን ጴጥሮስ ተሰጠው፣ ድንግልና ለዮሐንስ፣ መልእክት መጻፍ ለጳውሎስ፣ የቤተ ክርስቲያን ብርሃኗ ነውና።
blocks.english: To our father Peter were given the keys, and virginity to John, and apostleship to our father Paul, for he was the light of the church.
blocks.transliteration: Tewihibo merahut le'abune PeTros wedingilina leYohanis wemeli'ikt le'abune Pawlos isme wi'itu birhana lebéte kiristeeyan.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ዕፍረት ምዕዝት ይእቲ ማርያም እስመ ዘውስተ ከርሣ ዘይትሌዐል እምኵሉ ዕጣን መጽአ ወተሠገወ እምኔሃ።
blocks.amharic: መዓዛ ያላት ሽቱ ማርያም ናት። የማኅፀንዋ ፍሬ ከዕጣን ሁሉ የሚበልጥ ነውና መጥቶ ከርሷ ሰው ሆነ።
blocks.english: The fragrant ointment is Mary, for He that was in her womb, who is more fragrant than all incense, came and was incarnate of her.
blocks.transliteration: Ireft mi'izit yi'itee Mariam isme zewiste kersa zeyitlé'al imkwulu iTan meÍi'a wetesegewe imnéha.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ለማርያም ድንግል ንጽሕት ሠምራ አብ ወአሠርገዋ ደብተራ ለማኅደረ ፍቁር ወልዱ።
blocks.amharic: ንጽሕት ድንግል ማርያምን አብ ወደዳት፤ ለተወደደ ልጁ ማደሪያ እንድትሆን አስጌጣት።
blocks.english: In Mary virgin pure the Father was well-pleased, and He decked her to be a tabernacle for the habitation of His beloved Son.
blocks.transliteration: LeMariam Dingil nitshit semra ab we'aserigewa debtera lemahidere fiqur weldu.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ተውህቦ ሕግ ለሙሴ ወክህነት ለአሮን ተውህቦ ዕጣን ኅሩይ ለዘካርያስ ካህን።
blocks.amharic: ሕግ ለሙሴ ተሰጠው፤ ክህነት ለአሮን፣ የተመረጠም ዕጣን ለካህኑ ለዘካርያስ።
blocks.english: Tewihibo hig leMusé wekihinet le'Aron tewihibo iÊan hiruy leZekariyas kahin. To Moses was given the law, and priesthood to Aaron. To Zacharias the priest was given chosen incense.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ደብተራ ስምዕ ገብርዋ በከመ ነገረ እግዚእ ወአሮን ካህን በማእከላ የዐርግ ዕጣነ ኅሩየ።
blocks.amharic: ጌታ እንደተናገረ የምስክር ድንኳን አደረጓት፣ ካህኑ አሮን በመካከሏ የተመረጠ ዕጣን ያሳርጋል።
blocks.english: They made a tabernacle of testimony according to the word of God; and Aaron the priest, in the midst thereof, made the chosen incense to go up.
blocks.transliteration: Debtera sim'i gebriwa bekeme negere igzee'I we'Aron kahin bema'ikela ye'arig iTan hiruye.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ሱራፌል ይሰግዱ ሎቱ ወኪሩቤል ይሴብሕዎ ይጸርሑ እንዘ ይብሉ። ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ እግዚአብሔር በኀበ አእላፍ ወክቡር በውስተ ረበዋት። አንተ ውእቱ ዕጣን ኦ መድኃኒነ እስመ መጻእከ ወአድኃንከነ ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.amharic: ሱራፌል ይሰግዱለታል። ኪሩቤልም ያመሰግኑታል። እንዲህ እያሉ፣ ይዘምራሉ እግዚአብሔር በአእላፍ መላእክት ዘንድ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ፣ ቅዱስ ነው። በአለቆችም ዘንድ ክቡር ነው። መድኃኒታችን ሆይ! ዕጣን አንተ ነህ፤ መጥተህ አድነኸናልና። ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: The seraphim worship Him, and cherubim praise Him and cry saying: Holy Holy Holy is the Lord among the thousands and honored among the tens of thousands. Thou art the incense, O our savior, for Thou didst come and save us. Have mercy upon us.
blocks.transliteration: Surafel yisegidulotu wekeerubél yisébihwo yiÍerhu inze yiblu. Qidus qidus qidus Igzee'abihér behabe a'ilaf wekibur bewiste rebewat. Ante wi'itu iTan o medhaneene isme meÍa'ike we'adhankene tesahalene.
blocks.speaker: all

blocks.amharic: ቅዱስ።
blocks.english: Holy
blocks.speaker: priest
congregation
blocks.geez: እግዚአብሔር ቅዱስ ኃያል ቅዱስ ሕያው ዘኢይመውት ዘተወልደ እማርያም እምቅድስት ድንግል ተሣሃለነ እግዚኦ። ቅዱስ እግዚአብሔር ቅዱስ ኃያል ቅዱስ ሕያው ዘኢይመውት ዘተጠምቀ በዮርዳኖስ ወተሰቅለ ዲበ ዕፀ መስቀል። ተሣሃለነ እግዚኦ። ቅዱስ እግዚአብሔር ቅዱስ ኃያል ቅዱስ ሕያው ዘኢይመውት ዘተንሥአ
blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር፣ ቅዱስ ኃያል ቅዱስ ሕያው የማይሞት፤ ከቅድስት ድንግል ማርያም የተወለደ፣ አቤቱ ይቅር በለን። ቅዱስ እግዚአብሔር፣ ቅዱስ ኃያል ቅዱስ ሕያው የማይሞት፤ በዮርዳኖስ የተጠመቀ፣ በመስቀል ላይ የተሰቀለ አቤቱ ይቅር በለን። ቅዱስ እግዚአብሔር፣ ቅዱስ ኃያል ቅዱስ ሕያው የማይሞት፤ በሦስተኛው ቀን ከሙታን ተለይቶ የተነሣ፣ በክብር በምስጋና ወደ ሰማይ የወጣ፣ በአባቱ ቀኝ የተቀመጠ፣ በሕያዋንና በሙታን ይፈርድ ዘንድ ዳግመኛ በጌትነት ይመጣል አቤቱ ይቅር በለን። ለአብ ምስጋና ለወልድ ምስጋና፣ ለመንፈስ ቅዱስ ምስጋና ዛሬም፣
blocks.english: God, holy Mighty, holy Living, Immortal, who was born from the holy Virgin Mary, have mercy upon us, Lord. Holy God, Holy Mighty, Holy Living, Immortal, who was baptized in Jordan and crucified on the tree of the cross, have mercy upon us, Lord. Holy God, Holy Mighty, Holy Living, Immortal, who didst rise from the dead on the third day,
blocks.transliteration: Igzee'abihér, qidus hayal qidus hiyaw ze'eeyimewit zetewelde iMariam imqidist dingil tesahalene igzee'o. Qidus Igzee'abiher qidus hayal qidus hiyaw ze'iymewit zeteTemqe beYordanos weteseqle deebe itSe mesqel tesahalene igzio. Qidus Igzee'abihér qidus hayal qidus hiyaw ze'eeyimewit zetensi'a imutan ame salist ilet Ascend into heaven in

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.geez: እሙታን አመ ሣልስት ዕለት ዐርገ በስብሐት ውስተ ሰማያት ወነበረ በየማነ አቡሁ ዳግመ ይመጽእ በስብሐት ይኰንን ሕያዋነ ወሙታነ ተሣሃለነ እግዚኦ። ስብሐት ለአብ ስብሐት ለወልድ ስብሐት ለመንፈስ ቅዱስ ይእዜኒ ወዘልፈኒ ለዓለመ ዓለም አሜን ወአሜን ለይኩን፣ ለይኩን። ቅዱስ ሥሉስ እግዚአብሔር ሕያው ተሣሃለነ።
blocks.amharic: ዘወትርም ለዘለዓለም እውነት በእውነት ይሁን፣ ይሁን። በሦስትነት ያለህ ቅዱስ ሕያው እግዚአብሔር ሆይ! ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Arge besibihat wiste semayat wenebere beyemane abuhu again wilt come in glory to judge the quick and the dead, have mercy upon us, Lord. Glory be to the Father, glory be to the Son, glory be to the Holy Spirit, both now and ever and world without end. Amen and Amen, so be it, so be it. O Holy Trinity, living God have mercy on us.
blocks.transliteration: glory, sit at the right hand of thy Father and Dagime yimeÍ'i besibhat yikwonin hiyawane wemutane tesahalene igzee'o. Sibhat le'Ab sibhat leWeld sibhat leMenfes Qidus Yi'izénee wezelfenee wele'alem alem amen we'amen leyikun leyikun. Qidus silus Igzee'abihér hiyaw tesahalene.

blocks.amharic: የእግዚአብሔር ጸጋ ከእናንተ ጋር ይሁን።
blocks.english: The grace of God be with you.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: And with Your Spirit.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ለእግዚአብሔር ምስጋና ይሁን።
blocks.english: Let us glorify our God
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: እውነት ነው ይገባል።
blocks.english: It is right, it is just.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: የልባችሁን አሳብ አጽኑ።
blocks.english: Strengthen the thought of your heart,
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ብነ ኀበ እግዚአብሔር አቡነ ዘበሰማያት፣ አቡነ ዘበሰማያት፣ አቡነ ዘበሰማያት ኢታብአነ እግዚኦ ውስተ መንሱት።
blocks.amharic: በእግዚአብሔር ዘንድ አለን። አባታችን ሆይ! አባታችን ሆይ! አባታችን ሆይ! አቤቱ ወደ ፈተና አታግባን።
blocks.english: We lift them unto the Lord our God. Our Father who art in heaven, Our Father who art in heaven, Our Father who art in heaven, lead us not into temptation.
blocks.transliteration: Bine habe Igzee'abihér abune zebesemayat, abune zebesemayat, Abune zebesemayat, eetabi'ane igzee'o wiste mensut.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ካህኑ የኪዳን ጸሎት “እግዚአብሔር አብ …” የሚለውን በንባብ ሲያሰማ፤
blocks.english: As the priest starts to read the “O God theFather...” Prayer of the Covenant

blocks.amharic: አቤቱ አንተን እናመሰግንሃለን።
blocks.english: Oh we thank Thee.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ካህኑ የኪዳን ጸሎት “እግዚኦ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ …” በንባብ ሲያሰማ፤
blocks.english: As the priest starts to read the ”O Lord, Jesus Christ ” Prayer of the Covenant

blocks.amharic: አቤቱ አንተን እናወድስሃለን።
blocks.english: Oh Lord, we praise Thee.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ካህኑ የኪዳን ጸሎት “ንሤልስ ለከ ዘንተ ቅዱስ …” አሰምቶ እንዳበቃ
blocks.english: After the priest finishes reading the “Thrice over...” Prayer of the Covenant”

blocks.amharic: አሜን።
blocks.english: Amen
blocks.speaker: congregation
congregation
blocks.geez: አቡነ ዘበሰማያት ይትቀደስ ስምከ ትምጻእ መንግሥትከ ወይኩን ፈቃድከ በከመ በሰማይ ከማሁ በምድር። ሲሳየነ ዘለለ ዕለትነ ሀበነ ዮም።  ኅድግ ለነ አበሳነ ወጌጋየነ ከመ ንሕነኒ ንኅድግ ለዘአበሰ ለነ። ኢታብአነ እግዚኦ ውስተ መንሱት አላ አድኅነነ ወባልሐነ እምኵሉ እኩይ እስመ ዚኣከ ይእቲ መንግሥት ኃይል
blocks.amharic: አባታችን ሆይ! በሰማይ የምትኖር፣ ስምህ ይቀደስ፣ መንገሥትህ ትምጣ፣ ፈቃድህ በሰማይ እንደ ሆነ እንዲሁም በምድር ይሁን! የዕለት እንጀራችንን ስጠን ዛሬ፣በደላችንን ይቅር በለን፣ እኛም የበደሉንን ይቅር እንደምንል፣  አቤቱ ወደ ፈተና አታግባን፣ ከክፉ ሁሉ አድነን
blocks.english: Our father who art in heaven, hallowed be thy name, Thy kingdom come  Thy will be done on earth as it is in heaven; give us this day our daily bread, and forgive us our trespasses as we forgive them that trespass against us, and lead us not into temptation but deliver us and rescue us from all evil; for Thine is the kingdom, the power
blocks.transliteration: Abune zebesemayat yitqedes simike timtsa'i mengistike weyikun feqadike bekeme besemay kemahu medir. Seesayene zelele'iletine habene yom.  Hidig lene abesane

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.geez: ወስብሐት ለዓለመ ዓለም። በሰላመ ቅዱስ ገብርኤል መልአክ ኦ እግዝእትየ ማርያም ሰላም ለኪ እመ እግዚአብሔር ጸባዖት ሰላም ለኪ ቡርክት አንቲ እምአንስት
blocks.amharic: እንጂ፣  መንግሥት ያንተ ናትና። ኃይል፣ ምስጋና ለዘለዓለም በእውነት። እመቤታችን ቅድስት ድንግል ማርያም ሆይ በመልአኩ በቅዱስ ገብረኤል ሰላምታ ሰላም እልሻለሁ ድንግል በኅሊናኪ ወድንግል በሥጋኪ።  በሃሳብሽ ድንግል ነሽ በሥጋሽም ድንግል ነሽ። የአሸናፊ የእግዚአብሔር
blocks.english: and the glory for ever and ever. O Holy Virgin Mary, in the peace of the Angel Gabriel, peace be unto Thee. Thou art virgin in spirit as well as in body. O Thou Mother of Perfect God peace be unto Thee. Blessed art Thou among women and blessed is the Fruit of Thy womb. Rejoice O Thou who art full of grace the Lord is with Thee. Ask and
blocks.transliteration:
wegégayene keme nihinenee nihidig leze'abese lene.
eetabi'ane egzi’o weste mensut ala adihinene webalihane imkwulu iku’y isme zee'ake yi'itee mengist hayl wesibihat le'alem alem.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.geez: ወቡሩክ ፍሬ ከርሥኪ። ተፈሥሒ ፍሥሕት ኦ ምልእተ ጸጋ እግዚአብሔር ምስሌኪ። ሰአሊ ወጸልዪ ኀበ ፍቁር ወልድኪ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ከመ ይሥረይ ለነ ኃጣውኢነ።
blocks.amharic: እናት ሆይ ሰላምታ ላንቺ ይገባል። ከሴቶች ሁሉ ተለይተሽ አንቺ የትባረክሽ ነሽ የማኅፀንሽም ፍሬ የተባረከ ነው። ጸጋን የተመላሽ ሆይ ደስ ይበልሽ እግዚአብሔር ከአንቺ ጋር ነውና ከተወደደው ልጅሽ ከጌታችን ከመድኃኒታችን ከኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ዘንድ ይቅርታን ለምኝልን ኃጢአታችንን ያስተሠርይልን ዘንድ ለዘለዓለሙ አሜን።
blocks.english: pray for us to Thy beloved Son, Jesus Christ that He may have mercy upon our souls and forgive us our sins. Amen.
blocks.transliteration: Beselame qidus gebriel mel’ak o egzi’etiye Mariyam selam leki dingil behilinaki wedingil besigaki eme egziabiheir tseba’ot selam leki burikt anti em’a’nist weburuk fire kersike tefesihi fisiht o meli’i’te tsega egziabihear misle’ki seali wetseliye habe fiqur weldike eyesus kristos keme y’sre’y lene hatawi’ine

blocks.geez: ተፈሥሒ፣ ተፈሥሒ፣ ተፈሥሒ ኦ ማርያም ድንግል ምልዕተ ጸጋ።
blocks.amharic: ጸጋን የተመላሽ ድንግል ማርያም ሆይ ደስ ይበልሽ፣ ደስ ይበልሽ፣ ደስ ይበልሽ።
blocks.english: Tefesihee tefesihee tefesihee o Mariam dingil mil'ite tsega. Rejoice, rejoice, rejoice, O Virgin Mary, full of grace.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር ካንቺ ጋር ነው።
blocks.english: The Lord is with thee.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ወደ ተወደደ ልጅሽ ለምኝልን አማልጅንም።
blocks.english: Intercede and pray to thy beloved Son;
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ኃጢአታችንን ያስተሠርይልን ዝንድ።
blocks.english: That he may forgive us our sins.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ስብሐት ወክቡር ለሥሉስ ቅዱስ ይደሉ አብ ወወልድ ወመንፈስ ቅዱስ ኵሎ ጊዜ ይእዜኒ ወዘልፈኒ ወለዓለመ ዓለም አሜን።
blocks.amharic: ልዩ ሦስት ለሚሆን ለአብና ለወልድ ለመንፈስ ቅዱስም ሁልጊዜ ክብር ምስጋና ይገባቸዋል ዛሬም ዘወትርም ለዘላለሙ አሜን።
blocks.english: Glory and honor are meet to the Holy Trinity, the Father and the Son and the Holy Spirit at all times, both now and ever and world without end. Amen.
blocks.transliteration: Sibhat wekibir lesilus qidus yidelu Ab weWeld weMenfes Qidus kwulo geezé yi'izénee wezelfenee wele'alem alem amen.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ለጸሎት ተነሡ።
blocks.english: Stand up for prayer.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Lord have mercy upon us.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ሰላም ለሁላችሁም።
blocks.english: Peace be unto you all.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: And with Your Spirit.
blocks.speaker: congregation
priest
blocks.geez: አቤቱ ፈጣሪያችን እግዚአብሔር ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ ሆይ! ክቡራን ንጹሐን ለሚሆኑ ደቀመዝሙሮችህ ለሐዋርያት እንዲህ ያልካቸው። (በንባብ) እናንተ የምታዩትን ያዩ ዘንድ ብዙ ነቢያት ጻድቃን ወደዱ፤ አላዩም። እናንት
blocks.english: O Lord Jesus Christ, our God, who didst say to Thy holy disciples and Thy pure apostles: Many prophets and righteous men have desired to see the things which ye see and have not seen them, and have desired to hear the things which ye hear and have not heard them, but you, blessed are your eyes that have seen and your ears that have heard,

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.geez: ዛሬ የምትሰሙትንም ይሰሙ ዘንድ ወደዱ፤ አልሰሙም። የናንተ ያዩ ዓይኖቻችሁና የሰሙ ጆሮቻችሁ ግን የተመሰገኑ ናቸው። እኛንም እንደ እነሱ የበቃን አድርገን፤ በቅዱሳን ጸሎት የከበረ የወንጌልን ቃል ሰምተን እንሠራ ዘንድ።
blocks.english: Do Thou make us also like them meet to hear and to do the word of Thy holy gospel through the prayer of the saints.

blocks.amharic: ክቡር ስለሚሆን ወንጌል ጸልዩ።
blocks.english: Pray for the holy gospel.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: የከበረ ወንጌልን ለመስማት የበቃን ያድርገን።
blocks.english: May He make us meet to hear the holy gospel.
blocks.speaker: congregation
priest
blocks.geez: ዳግመኛ አቤቱ ካንተ ዘንድ የምንሻውን በምንለምንበትና በምንጸልይበት ጊዜ እናስባቸው ዘንድ አስቡን ያሉንን ዳግመኛ አስብ። አቤቱ አምላካችን እግዚአብሔር ሆይ ከእኛ አስቀድመው
blocks.english: Remember again, Lord them that have bidden us to remember them at the time of our prayers and supplications wherewith we make request of Thee. O Lord our God, give rest to them that have fallen asleep before us, heal speedily them that are sick, for Thou art the life of us all, the hope of us all, the deliverer of us all and the raiser

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.geez: የሞቱትን አሳርፋቸው የታመሙትንም ፈጥነህ አድናቸው። የሁላችን ሕይወት የሁላችንም ተስፋ የሁላችንም አዳኝ የሁላችንም አስነሽ አንተ ነህና። ላንተ ምስጋና እስከ አርያም ድረስ እንልካለን።
blocks.english: of us all, and to Thee we lift up thanksgiving unto the highest heaven, world without end.

blocks.amharic: ተዘከር እግዚኦ ከመ መሬት ንሕነ። ወሰብእሰ ከመ ሣዕር መዋዕሊሁ። ወከመ ጽጌ ገዳም ከማሁ ይፈሪ።
blocks.transliteration: teze’ker I’gzio ke’me me’reit ni’hene. wese’bise keme sa’iri mewa’i’leehu. we’keme tsi’gei ge’dami kema’hu yi’fe’ri.

blocks.geez:
ተዘከር እግዚኦ ከመ መሬት ንሕነ። 
ወሰብእሰ ከመ ሣዕር መዋዕሊሁ። 
ወከመ ጽጌ ገዳም ከማሁ ይፈሪ። ሃሌ ሉያ! ቁሙ ወአጽምኡ ወንጌለ ቅዱሰ፣ ዜናሁ ለእግዚእነ ወመድኃኒነ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ
blocks.amharic:
አቤቱ፤ እኛ ዐፈር እንደ ሆንን ዐስብ።
ሰውስ ዘመኑ እንደ ሣር ነው። 
እንደ ዱ ሃሌ ሉያ! ጌታችን የመድኃኒታችን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ የተናገረውን ክቡር የሚሆን ወንጌል ቆማችሁ አድምጡ።
blocks.transliteration: Halléluya qumu we'atsmi'u wengéle qiduse zenahu le'igzee'ine wemedhaneene Eeyesus Kiristos.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: እግዚአብሔር ከሁላችሁ ጋር ይሁን። ምስለ መንፈስከ። ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: The Lord be with you all. And with Thy spirit.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ወንጌል ቅዱስ ዘዜነወ ቃለ ወልድ እግዚአብሔር።
blocks.amharic: ክቡር የሚሆን ይህ ወንጌል የእግዚአብሔር ልጅ ቃል ነው።
blocks.english: The Holy Gospel the Word of the Son of God.
blocks.transliteration: wengèl qidus zezènewe qale weld igzee’abihèr.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ስብሐት ለከ ክርስቶስ እግዚእየ ወአምላኪየ ኵሉ ጊዜ ተፈስሑ በእግዚአብሔር ዘረዳአነ ወየብቡ ለአምላከ ያዕቆብ ንሥኡ መዝሙረ ወሀቡ ከበሮ። መዝሙር ሐዋዝ ዘምስለ መሰንቆ።
blocks.amharic: ጌታዬ ፈጣሪዬ ክርስቶስ ሆይ ሁልጊዜ ምስጋና ይገባሃል። ረዳት በሆነን በእግዚአብሔር ደስ ይበላችሁ፤ የያዕቆብንም አምላክ አመስግኑ፤ መዝሙር በሉ፤ ከበሮም ያዙ፤ መዝሙር ከበገና ጋራ የተስማማ ነው።
blocks.english: Glory be to Thee, Christ my Lord and my God, at all times. Sing aloud unto God our strength make a joyful noise unto the God of Jacob Take a psalm, and bring hither the timbrel, the pleasant harp with the psaltery.
blocks.transliteration: Sibhat leke Kiristos igzee'iye we'amlakeeye kwulu geezé tefesihu be’Igzee’abihèr zeredi’ane weyebibu le-amlake Ya’iqob nisi’u mezmure wehabu kebero. Mezmur hawaz zemisle mesenqo.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ቅዱስ ሉቃስ 12 ፡ 16 – 31
blocks.english: Reading from The Gospel St. Luke Ch. 12 : 16 - 31

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.geez: መኑ ይመስለከ እምነ አማልክት እግዚኦ አንተ ውእቱ ዘትገብር መንከረ አርአይኮሙ ለሕዝብከ በመዝራዕትከ። ሖርከ ውስተ ሲኦል ወአዕረገ ጼዋ እምህየ ወጸጎከነ
blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ከአማልክት ወገን የሚመስልህ ማነው፤ ተአምራትን የምታደርግ አንት ነህ፤ ኃይልህን ለወገኖችህ አሳየሃቸው፤ ወደ ሲዖል ወርደህ ምርኮን ከዚያ አወጣህ፤ ነፃነትንም ዳግመኛ
blocks.english: Who is like unto Thee, O Lord, among the gods? Thou art the God that doest wonders: Thou hast declared Thy strength among the people. Thou hast with Thine arm redeemed Thy people. Thou didst go into Kades and the Captives rose up from there, and thou didst grant us again to be set free, for Thou didst come and save us. For this cause we
blocks.transliteration: menu yimesileke inine amalikt igzee'o ante wi'itu zetigebir menkire ar'ayikomu lehizbike hayleke we'adhankomu lehizibike bemezra'itike. horke wiste see'ol we'a'irege séwa

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.geez: ምዕረ ዳግመ ግዕዛነ እስመ መጻእከ ወአድኅከነ በእንተ ዝንቱ ንሴብሓከ ወንጸርሕ ኅቤከ እንዘ ንብል ብሩክ አንተ እግዚኦ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ እስመ መጻእከ ወአድኅንከነ
blocks.amharic: ለዘለዓለም ሰጠህን። መጥተህ አድነህናልና። ስለዚህ እናመሰግንሃለን፤ ወዳንተም እንዲህ እያልን እንጠራለን፡ አቤቱ ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስ፡ ቡሩክ አንተ ነህ፤ ሰው ሆነህ አድነህናልና።
blocks.english: glorify Thee and cry unto Thee saying, Blessed art Thou, Lord Jesus Christ, for Thou didst come and save us.
blocks.transliteration: imhiye wesegokene mi ire dagime gilizane isme mesa'ike we'adhankene. be inte zintu nisébihake weniserih habéke inze nibl buruk ante igzee'o Eeyesus Kiristos isme mesa'ike we'adhankene.

blocks.speaker: deacon
blocks.geez: ፃኡ ንኡሰ ክርስቲያን። ዘሀገር ዓባይ ኢትዮጵያ ወዲበ ርእሰ ሀገረ አበዊነ ብፁዕ
blocks.amharic: የክርስቲያን ታናናሾች በሰላም ሂዱ። ተንሥኡ ለጸሎት ፖለጸሎት ተነሡ። እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ። አቤቱ ይቅር በለን። ሰላም ለኵልክሙ። ሰላም ለሁላችሁም። ምስለ መንፈስከ። ከመንፈስህ ጋራ። ጸልዩ በእንተ ሰላመ ቤተ ክርስቲያን አሐቲ ቅድስት ጉባኤ እንተ ሐዋርያት ርትዕት በኀበ እግዚአብሔር ሐዋርያት ለሰበሰቡዋት በእግዚአብሔር ዘንድ ስለቀናች ክብርት ስለምትሆን አንዲት ቤተ ክርስቲያን ስላም ጸልዩ። ኪርያላይሶን። ጸልዩ በእንተ ርእሰ ሊቃነ ጳጳሳት አባ ማትያስ እግዚእነ ርእሰ ሊቃነ ጳጳሳት ብፁዕ ስለሚሆን ስለ ሊቀ ጳጳሳቱ ስለ አባ ማትያስ
blocks.english: Tsasu ni'use kiristeeyan. Go forth, ye catechumens. Stand up for prayer. Lord have mercy upon us. Peace be unto you all. And with Thy spirit. Pray for the peace of the one holy apostolic church orthodox in the Lord. Pray for the Patriarch Abba Matthias lord chief of the bishops of the great country Ethiopia, and for the blessed Primate
blocks.transliteration: Tensi'u letselot Igzee'o tesahalene. Selam lekwulikimu. Misle menfesike. Tseliyu be'inte selame béte kiristeeyan ahatee qidist guba'é inte hawariyat riti'it behabe Igzee'abihér.

blocks.speaker: deacon
blocks.geez: ሊቀ ጳጳስነ አባ ጴጥሮስ ወኵሎሙ ኤጲስ ቆጶሳት ቀሳውስት ወዲያቆናት ርቱዓነ ሃይማኖት።
blocks.amharic: የደገኛዩቱ አገር ኢትዮጵያ ፓትርያርክ የሊቃነ ጳጳሳቱ አለቃ ጌታ ስለሚሆን ባባቶቻችን አገርም ብፁዕ ስለሚሆን ስለ አባ ጴጥሮስ ሃይማኖታቸው ስለ ቀና ስለ ኤጲስ ቆጶሳቱ ስለ ቀሳውስቱና ስለ ዲያቆናቱም ሁሉ ጸልዩ።
blocks.english: of the country of our fathers Abba Peter and all wekwulomu épees qoposat qesawist wedeeyaqonat ritu'ane haymanot. the orthodox bishops, priests and deacons.
blocks.transliteration: Kyrie eleison. Tseliyu be'inte ri'ise leeqane papasat Abba Matyas Egziene ri'ise leeqane papasat zehager abayi Ethiopia wedeebe ri'ise hagere abeweene bisu'i leeqe papasine abba Petros

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.amharic: ለጸሎት ተነሡ። እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ። አቤቱ ይቅር በለን። ሰላም ለኵልክሙ። ሰላም ለሁላችሁም። ምስለ መንፈስከ። ከመንፈስህ ጋራ። ጸልዩ በእንተ ዛቲ ቤተ ክርስቲያን ቅድስት ወማኅበርነ በውስቴታ። ክብር ስለምትሆን ስለዚች ቤተ ክርስቲያን በውስጥዋም ስላለ
blocks.english: Stand up for prayer. Lord have mercy upon us. Peace be unto you all. And with Thy spirit. kiristeeyan qidist wemahiberene bewisteta. Pray for this holy church and our congregation therein. Mahiberene barike iqeb beselam. Bless our congregation and keep them in peace. Nibel kwuline betibebe Let us all say, in the wisdom of God, the prayer
blocks.transliteration: Tensi'u letselot Igzee'o tesahalene. Selam lekwulikimu. Misle menfesike.

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.amharic: አንድነታችንም ጸልዪ ማኅበርነ ባርከ ዕቀብ በሰላም። አንድነታችንን ባርክ በስላም ጠብቅ። ንበል ኵልነ በጥበበ እግዚአብሔር ጸሎተ ሃይማኖት። በእግዚአብሔር ጥበብ ሆነን ሁላችን የሃይማኖትን ጸሎት እንበል። ንጹሕ የሆነ ከቍርባኑ ይቀበል፤ … ይህን የቄሱን ቃል ያቀለለ ወይም የሳቀና
blocks.english: of faith Apostle’s Creed He that is pure let him receive of the oblation and he that is not pure let him not receive it, that he may not be consumed by the fire of the Godhead which is prepared for the devil and his angels. Who so hath revenge in his heart and who so hath in him strange thoughts and fornication let him not draw nigh. As
blocks.transliteration: Tseliyu be'inte zatee béte Igzee'abihér tselote haymanot. Tensi'u letselot Igzee'o

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.amharic: የተነጋገረ ወይም በቤተ ክርስቲያን ውስጥ በክፋት የቆመ ቢኖር ጌታችንን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስን እንዳሳዘንው በርሱም እንደ ተነሣሣ ይወቅ ይረዳ ስለ በረከት ፈንታ መርገምን ስለ ኃጢአት ሥርየት ፈንታም ገሃነመ እሳትን ከእግዚአብሔር ዘንድ ይቀበላል ተንሥኡ ለጸሎት ለጸሎት
blocks.english: I have cleansed my hands from outward pollution, so also I am pure from the blood of you all. If you presumptuously draw nigh to the body and blood of Christ I will not be responsible for your reception thereof. I am pure of your wickedness but your sin will return upon your head if you do not draw nigh in purity. If there be any who
blocks.transliteration: tesahalene. Selam lekwulikimu. Misle menfesike. Sibhat le'Igzee'abihér besemayat

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.amharic: ተነሡ። እግዚኦ ተሣሃለነ። አቤቱ ይቅር በለን። ሰላም ለኵልክሙ። ሰላም ለሁላችሁም። ምስለ መንፈስከ። ከመንፈስህ ጋራ። ባስልዮስ የተናገረው የአምኃ ጸሎት ለዘላለሙ ገናና የምትሆን እግዚአብሔር ሆይ ያለጥፋት ሰውን የፈጠርኸው። አስቀድሞ በሰይጣን ቅንዓት የገባውን ሞት …
blocks.english: disdains this word of the priest or laughs or speaks or stands in the church in an evil manner, let him know and understand that he is provoking to wrath our Lord Jesus Christ, and bringing upon himself a curse instead of a blessing, and will get from God the fire of hell instead of the remission of sin. Stand up for prayer. Lord have
blocks.transliteration: weselam bemidir simretu leseb'i. Tseliyu be'inte selam fitsimt wefiqir te'amihu bebeyinateekimu

blocks.speaker: congregation
blocks.amharic: ስብሐት ለእግዚአብሔር በሰማያት ወሰላም በምድር ሥምረቱ ለስብእ በሰማይ ለእግዚአብሔር ምስጋና ይገባል ሰላም በምድር ፍቅሩ ለሰው ሆነ። አቤቱ ፈቃድህን በሁላችን ልቡና ሙላ፤ ጸልዩ በእንተ ሰላም ፍጽምት ወፍቅር ተአምኁ በበይናቲክሙ በአምኃ ቅድሳት። ፍጽምት ስልምትሆን ሰላምና ፍቅር ጸልዪ እርስ በርሳችሁ በተለየች ሰላምታ እጅ ተነሳሱ። ክርስቶስ አምላክነ ረስየነ ድልዋነ ከመ ንትአማኅ በበይናቲነ በአምኃ ቅድሳት ፈጣሪያችን ክርስቶስ ሆይ እርስ በርሳችን  በከበረች ሰላምታ እጅ እንነሳሳ ዘንድ የበቃን አድርገን።
blocks.english: mercy upon us. Peace be unto you all. And with Thy spirit. “Prayer of Salutation” of St. Basil: God, great eternal, who didst form a man uncorrupt, Glory to God in heaven and on earth peace, His goodwill toward men. Pray for the perfect peace and love. Salute one another with a holy salutation Christ our God, make us meet to salute one another with a holy salutation. ANAPHORA OF OUR LORD
blocks.transliteration: be'amiha qidisat. Kiristos amlakine resiyene diliwane keme niti'amah bebeyinateene be'amiha qidisat.

blocks.amharic: የክርስቲያን ታናናሾች በሰላም ሂዱ። ለጸሎት ተነሡ።
blocks.english: Go forth, ye catechumens. Stand up for prayer.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Lord have mercy upon us.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ሰላም ለሁላችሁም።
blocks.english: Peace be unto you all.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: And with Thy spirit.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ጸልዩ በእንተ ሰላመ ቤተ ክርስቲያን አሐቲ ቅድስት ጉባኤ እንተ ሐዋርያት ርትዕት በኀበ እግዚአብሔር
blocks.amharic: ሐዋርያት ለሰበሰቡዋት በእግዚአብሔር ዘንድ ስለቀናች ክብርት ስለምትሆን አንዲት ቤተ ክርስቲያን ስላም ጸልዩ።
blocks.english: Pray for the peace of the one holy apostolic church orthodox in the Lord.
blocks.transliteration: Tseliyu be'inte selame béte kiristeeyan ahatee qidist guba'é inte hawariyat riti'it behabe Igzee'abihér.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.english: Kyrie eleison.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ጸልዩ በእንተ ርእሰ ሊቃነ ጳጳሳት አባ ማትያስ እግዚእነ ርእሰ ሊቃነ ጳጳሳት ዘሀገር ዓባይ ኢትዮጵያ ወዲበ ርእሰ ሀገረ አበዊነ ብፁዕ ሊቀ ጳጳስነ አባ ጴጥሮስ ወኵሎሙ ኤጲስ ቆጶሳት ቀሳውስት ወዲያቆናት ርቱዓነ ሃይማኖት። ተንሥኡ ለጸሎት
blocks.amharic: ብፁዕ ስለሚሆን ስለ ሊቀ ጳጳሳቱ ስለ አባ ማትያስ የደገኛዩቱ አገር ኢትዮጵያ ፓትርያርክ የሊቃነ ጳጳሳቱ አለቃ ጌታ ስለሚሆን ባባቶቻችን አገርም ብፁዕ ስለሚሆን ስለ አባ ጴጥሮስ ሃይማኖታቸው ስለ ቀና ስለ ኤጲስ ቆጶሳቱ ስለ ቀሳውስቱና ስለ ዲያቆናቱም ሁሉ ጸልዩ። ለጸሎት ተነሡ።
blocks.english: Pray for the Patriarch Abba Matthias lord chief of the bishops of the great country Ethiopia, and for the blessed Primate of the country of our fathers Abba Peter and all the orthodox bishops, priests and deacons. Stand up for prayer.
blocks.transliteration: Tseliyu be'inte ri'ise leeqane papasat Abba Matyas Egziene ri'ise leeqane papasat zehager abayi Ethiopia wedeebe ri'ise hagere abeweene bisu'i leeqe papasine abba Petros wekwulomu épees qoposat qesawist wedeeyaqonat ritu'ane haymanot. Tensi'u letselot
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Lord have mercy upon us.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ሰላም ለሁላችሁም።
blocks.english: Peace be unto you all.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: And with Thy spirit.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ጸልዩ በእንተ ዛቲ ቤተ ክርስቲያን ቅድስት ወማኅበርነ በውስቴታ።
blocks.amharic: ክብር ስለምትሆን ስለዚች ቤተ ክርስቲያን በውስጥዋም ስላለ አንድነታችንም ጸልዪ
blocks.english: Pray for this holy church and our congregation therein.
blocks.transliteration: Tseliyu be'inte zatee béte kiristeeyan qidist wemahiberene bewisteta.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አንድነታችንን ባርክ በስላም ጠብቅ።
blocks.english: Bless our congregation and keep them in peace.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.geez: ንበል ኵልነ በጥበበ እግዚአብሔር ጸሎተ ሃይማኖት።
blocks.amharic: በእግዚአብሔር ጥበብ ሆነን ሁላችን የሃይማኖትን ጸሎት እንበል።
blocks.english: Let us all say, in the wisdom of God, the prayer of faith
blocks.transliteration: Nibel kwuline betibebe Igzee'abihér tselote haymanot.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.english: Apostle's Creed

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.amharic: ንጹሕ የሆነ
blocks.english: He that is pure let him receive of the oblation and he that is not pure let him not receive it, that he may not be consumed by the fire of the Godhead which is prepared for the devil and his angels. Who so hath revenge in his heart and who so hath in him strange thoughts and fornication let him not draw nigh. As I have cleansed my hands

blocks.speaker: priest
blocks.amharic: ከቍርባኑ ይቀበል፤ …
blocks.english: from outward pollution, so also I am pure from the blood of you all. If you presumptuously draw nigh to the body and blood of Christ I will not be responsible for your reception thereof. I am pure of your wickedness but your sin will return upon your head if you do not draw nigh in purity.

blocks.amharic: ይህን የቄሱን ቃል ያቀለለ ወይም የሳቀና የተነጋገረ ወይም በቤተ ክርስቲያን ውስጥ በክፋት የቆመ ቢኖር ጌታችንን ኢየሱስ ክርስቶስን እንዳሳዘንው በርሱም እንደ ተነሣሣ ይወቅ ይረዳ ስለ በረከት ፈንታ መርገምን ስለ ኃጢአት ሥርየት ፈንታም ገሃነመ እሳትን ከእግዚአብሔር ዘንድ ይቀበላል
blocks.english: If there be any who disdains this word of the priest or laughs or speaks or stands in the church in an evil manner, let him know and understand that he is provoking to wrath our Lord Jesus Christ, and bringing upon himself a curse instead of a blessing, and will get from God the fire of hell instead of the remission of sin.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: ለጸሎት ተነሡ።
blocks.english: Stand up for prayer.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ይቅር በለን።
blocks.english: Lord have mercy upon us.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ሰላም ለሁላችሁም።
blocks.english: Peace be unto you all.
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.amharic: ከመንፈስህ ጋራ።
blocks.english: And with Thy spirit.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: ባስልዮስ የተናገረው የአምኃ ጸሎት
blocks.english: "Prayer of Salutation" of St. Basil

blocks.amharic: ለዘላለሙ ገናና የምትሆን እግዚአብሔር ሆይ ያለጥፋት ሰውን የፈጠርኸው። አስቀድሞ በሰይጣን ቅንዓት የገባውን ሞት …
blocks.english: God, great eternal, who didst form a man uncorrupt,
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ስብሐት ለእግዚአብሔር በሰማያት ወሰላም በምድር ሥምረቱ ለስብእ
blocks.amharic: በሰማይ ለእግዚአብሔር ምስጋና ይገባል ሰላም በምድር ፍቅሩ ለሰው ሆነ።
blocks.english: Glory to God in heaven and on earth peace, His goodwill toward men.
blocks.transliteration: Sibhat le'Igzee'abihér besemayat weselam bemidir simretu leseb'i.
blocks.speaker: congregation

blocks.amharic: አቤቱ ፈቃድህን በሁላችን ልቡና ሙላ፤
blocks.speaker: priest

blocks.geez: ጸልዩ በእንተ ሰላም ፍጽምት ወፍቅር ተአምኁ በበይናቲክሙ በአምኃ ቅድሳት።
blocks.amharic: ፍጽምት ስልምትሆን ሰላምና ፍቅር ጸልዪ እርስ በርሳችሁ በተለየች ሰላምታ እጅ ተነሳሱ።
blocks.english: Pray for the perfect peace and love. Salute one another with a holy salutation
blocks.transliteration: Tseliyu be'inte selam fitsimt wefiqir te'amihu bebeyinateekimu be'amiha qidisat.
blocks.speaker: deacon

blocks.geez: ክርስቶስ አምላክነ ረስየነ ድልዋነ ከመ ንትአማኅ በበይናቲነ በአምኃ ቅድሳት
blocks.amharic: ፈጣሪያችን ክርስቶስ ሆይ እርስ በርሳችን  በከበረች ሰላምታ እጅ እንነሳሳ ዘንድ የበቃን አድርገን።
blocks.english: Christ our God, make us meet to salute one another with a holy salutation.
blocks.transliteration: Kiristos amlakine resiyene diliwane keme niti'amah bebeyinateene be'amiha qidisat.
blocks.speaker: congregation
